programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When the guys accidentally break Holly's vibrator, they scramble to fix it before she finds out so it doesn't ruin their friendship.

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: The Exes

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Colonel's Wife

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sweetheart Murders

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: DNA on one of two teenage girls killed in a similar fashion on a California beach six years apart leads investigators to a suspect who worked inside the police department.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Hunting Humans

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Phantoms

programme.desc: Jim Phelps assumes a risky pose as a drug addict with information to sell to get behind the Iron Curtain where he seeks to stop an unknown assassin from killing an unknown victim on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Crane
programme.desc: After rescuing a prisoner from execution by a dictator (guest star Carl Betz), the IMF has to find a hiding place so conspicuous it will be overlooked by police hunting the fugitive on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Wreck-Shaw
programme.desc: Allen drags a starving Ton to a weekend auction and some newbie buyers try to eat up all the profit. Will a rickshaw, a wrecking ball, and blast detonators be enough to satisfy Ton's appetite, or will the guys go home hungry?

programme.desc: Henri Landru targeted lonely vulnerable women left behind by the war. He seduced them with promises of marriage and lured them to houses outside Paris where they vanished

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Herbert Armstrong, convicted in 1922 of murdering his wife, he was the first and only solicitor to be hung in UK. But was he guilty?

programme.title: Naked Science: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?
programme.desc: Superflares are amongst the greatest events of the Universe. These magnetic explosions can release energy millions of times greater than atomic bombs. They produce streams of highly energetic particles which can be highly destructive to life.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Destroy A Planet
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: Naked Science: Making Mountains
programme.desc: The Rockies. Magnificent and awe-inspiring mysterious, the Rockies are one of the longest mountain ranges in the world. Naked Science investigates the geological processes that build these massive mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Italia Wild
programme.desc: In Italy, George studies avalanches of Dolomite Mountains, meets engineers who keep Venice from sinking, and heads South to explore Italy's explosive volcanoes: Vesuvius, Etna and Stromboli.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Boiling Lake
programme.desc: Tucked away, high in the mountains of the Caribbean island of Dominica lies a marvel of nature  a lake whose water literally boils and steams like a witch's cauldron.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Blizzards
programme.desc: Winter weather can be even more dangerous than thunderstorms and where else to explore the big chill than at the summit of Mount Washington which has the reputation as being the place with the "Worst weather in the world".

programme.title: Angry Planet: Desert Monsoon
programme.desc: Enlisting the help of fellow storm chaser R.J. Evans, George heads to Arizona to photograph spectacular lightning storms triggered by the desert monsoon season. R.J. however is known as "America's noisiest athiest" for his free-thought radio show.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat
programme.desc: Take a look at Landsat 8, the advanced planetary explorer with a 900 million dollar price tag! It is designed to peer across multiple wavelengths to reveal complex and ever-changing details that are undetectable by the human eye.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: Given a few reasonable assumptions about the chance of life arising elsewhere in the universe and the distance between the stars, why has an alien civilization not presented itself?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: In the world of astronomy, how do we overcome the limits imposed by our own eyesight? The universe comes alive by viewing the cosmos in infrared light to gamma radiation.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Rise of Antisemitism
programme.desc: Two of the most powerful Nazis go head to head - Josef Goebbels and Herman Göring.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Berghof Set
programme.desc: Ruthless infighting divides the Nazi leaders at Hitler’s mountain retreat.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Madness of Rudolf Hess
programme.desc: Hitler’s Deputy stakes his reputation on one last desperate gamble.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Rise and Fall of Reinhard Heydrich
programme.desc: The rise of Reinhard Heydrich: a story of mass murder.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Rise of the Sycophants
programme.desc: Albert Speer: Favouritism, Envy and Betrayal in Hitler’s inner circle.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Island of the Devil
programme.desc: Just 460,000 people live in Tasmania, an island off the southeast coast of mainland Australia. While its human population is small, the majestic state is rich in natural wonders and is known for its large tracts of pristine wilderness.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Southwest China - China’s Secret Garden
programme.desc: Tucked away in China’s southwest corner is a hidden oasis unlike any other. Snow-capped mountains, temperate valleys and tropical jungles are home to a spectacular array of wildlife.

programme.title: Wildest Middle East
programme.desc: Wildest Middle East reveals the remotest and most surprising corners of this ancient land, where you will find nothing is as it seems and where the natural world is fighting a constant battle to survive in an ever changing world.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Antarctic
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Australian Alps
programme.desc: It may come as a surprise to non-Australians that the island continent renowned for its flat plains and searing deserts has snow-capped mountains at all.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel continues the transformation of the two Ford Falcons. Part 2 of 2.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel takes on a classic 1958 Harley Davidson and a 1984 Kawasaki police cruiser.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel transforms a 1944 vintage firetruck.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel takes on a wild 60's inspired show truck. Part 1 of 2.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel continues on a wild 60's inspired show truck.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage: Ten Ton Truck
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel takes on a vintage military transport truck.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Irons in the Fire
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rocky Mountain Roundup
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client, named Alvin, whose bond is $20,000. Then the team goes after Craig, a client of Bobby's whose bond is almost $70,000.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: This One's For You
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Baby Lyssa Steps Up
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Running on Empty
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Inside Out
programme.desc: Dog kickstarts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Growing Up Is Hard To Do
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Year of the Dog
programme.desc: A one-hour special that looks back at 2006, one of Dog's most tumultuous years, which has included the passing of Beth's father, Dog and Beth's wedding, the tragic death of Dog's daughter Barbara.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Mystery of Mona Lisa
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Disappearing Acts
programme.desc: After Willie and Jase lose Si's tea cup, Si makes them go to great lengths to find it. When the entertainment for Gus's 1st birthday party falls through, Jep fills in as a magician.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Dance Dads
programme.desc: Willie, Korie, Jase and Missy take dance lessons from Sadie to prepare for Reed and Rebecca's upcoming weddings. Jase's plan to perform Reed's wedding ceremony may fall through when he waits until the last minute to renew his ordainment.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: End of an Era
programme.desc: When Si decides to retire to pursue a music career, the family organizes a party in his honor. Meanwhile, Willie, Phil, and Jase take a road trip to try to recreate an old duck call for Si's retirement gift.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Looking Back and Talking Quack
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a look back at 130 episodes of Duck Dynasty.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Grass & The Furious
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck for the Duckmen when an old high school nemesis challenges them to a good old-fashioned race.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Driving Miss Sadie
programme.desc: With Sadie's driver's license test fast approaching, she finds herself in dire need of lessons. Willie, Jase and Si each set out to correct her glaring failures behind the wheel by teaching her how to drive... Robertson-style.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Truck Commander
programme.desc: After Willie's son, John Luke, leaves Willie's pickup in the driveway with a bone-dry gas tank, Willie and Korie decide that it's time to get the kid his own car.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Si-Yonara
programme.desc: The Duck Commander assembly room gets an unexpected shakeup when a disgruntled Si decides to quit his job.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Hotel Of Dreams
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are bellhops at a hotel that has been given to an aimless young man by his father. They must deal with an unkind boss, an obnoxious kid and a difficult guest.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Another Song For Christmas
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help a heartless used car salesman reconsider his actions on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Plane Death
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark investigate a gang of drug smugglers after an old friend of Mark's has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: One Winged Angels
programme.desc: Jonathan attempts to fan the flames of love between a woman and her ex-husband's best friend. But his efforts backfire when he falls for the woman himself.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Going Home, Going Home
programme.desc: Mark is in a state between life and death when he's critically injured in a car accident. Jonathan takes Mark back to childhood to give him a second chance to tell his grandfather how much he loves him.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Mass Sightings
programme.desc: UFO sightings are at an all time high. What makes these mass sightings incredible is also what makes them terrifying, and what might happen next?

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Close Encounters
programme.desc: There is no safe place. Every day, all around the world, in the most ordinary places, regular people are spotting UFOs.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Physical Contact
programme.desc: These are the witnesses that have been literally touched by the unknown. Do these cases hold the answer to the central question of UFOlogy?

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Hot Spots
programme.desc: They keep coming back. There are areas around the world that seem to keep attracting UFOs, where objects return to the skies again and again, as if taunting witnesses below.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Security Threat
programme.desc: When your day job involves the oversight of missile silos, nuclear facilities or a military base, the last complication you want is a close encounter with a UFO...

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Abductions
programme.desc: These are first-hand experiences of the most terrifying kind: stories shot through with mystery, fear and endless questions.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Vendetta
programme.desc: Blake attacks Alexis when she attempts to take over the mansion; an emotionally disturbed Claudia is trapped by a wall of flame; Sammy Jo and Amanda fight for Clay's affections; Dominique learns the truth about Garrett's first marriage.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Victory
programme.desc: Alexis's life is spared as Krystle is able to restrain Blake's lethal temper; as La Mirage burns, Amanda is rescued by a mysterious stranger; Claudia is claimed victim by the ravaging flames.

programme.title: Dynasty: Sideswiped
programme.desc: An incensed Blake discovers the morning headlines accusing him of murder and arson; Adam offers his loyalties to Alexis and Colbyco; Alexis acquires enough stock to assume control of Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty: Focus
programme.desc: As Krystle recovers from the accident, Alexis persuades the D.A. to suspect Blake of arson; Dominique offers Blake a 50 million dollar loan; Phill Thorpe threatens to murder Krystle in retribution against Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty: Reward
programme.desc: Blake fires the La Mirage manager for withholding crucial information regarding the fire; Alexis offers a reward for the arrest and conviction of the arsonist; Michael Culhane continues to romance Amanda.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Arraignment
programme.desc: Krystle's dizzy spells force her to see a doctor; Jackie remembers seeing the La Mirage blaze start in Claudia's room, proving Blake's innocence; Blake receives a letter from Caress, pleading for his help.

programme.title: Blitz the Aftermath
programme.desc: With interviews and archive footage showing the sheer amount of devastation – from the loss of life to the immense damage caused to buildings across the country - The Aftermath looks at how the Blitz changed the face of Britain's cities and lives.

programme.title: Field of Valor
programme.desc: It was becoming clear in 1939 that direct U.S. involvement in World War Two was only a matter of time. Training approximately 500 to 750 pilots a year, the United States Army Air Corps was severely outmatched by the warring powers of Europe and Asia.

programme.title: Boy Soldiers Of World War II
programme.desc: In Britain during World War Two, thousands of men over the age of 18 were conscripted into the army, but among them were hundreds of underage boys, some as young as 15, who lied about their age so that they could join up.

programme.title: Brothers In Arms
programme.desc: The young men who joined up together, fought together and died together in World War One.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Max and co-host iO Tillett Wright help 18-year-old Mecca connect with the boy she's loved for the past 5 years. But when iO discovers that Mecca's digital beau may be using her pictures to catfish others, Mecca needs answers.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Thaddius sought refuge from his struggling marriage through an online relationship with Sara. When she starts telling tales of seizures and kidnappings, he starts to question her identity.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Chanelle is the light Michael needed in his life, but out of the blue she's disappeared, leaving only Nev and Max to help him find his missing love. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Long Islander Catherine has fallen deeply in love with country boy Graham from Tennessee. She's ready to uproot her life to be a country girl with him, but Nev and Max uncover that Graham's not everything he claims to be.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Vince can't seem to escape his online-ex, Alyssa, whose stalking has caused his real life girlfriend, Liz, to break up with him. Nev and Max help Vince confront Alyssa so he can try to salvage a future with Liz.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Courtney & Isaak
programme.desc: Courtney broke up with Isaak, who she met online. He's doing everything to get her back. Beauty queen Cassidy Wolf joins Nev to get Isaak to leave Courtney alone for good.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation The Party's Back
programme.desc: The honeymoon might be over for Angelina after Chris moves out. But Mike has a lot to celebrate as he reaches his five-year soberversary. To mark the occasion the roomies throw a parade in his honor and the surprise return of a certain roommate.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Seeing Joey and Lorena all over each other is too much for Ellie. Lateysha gets pied by Michael but a sexy new celebrity leaves her on cloud nine. Calum and Marisa continue to flirt.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Will You Be My Girlfriend?
programme.desc: Calum is caught between two exes - Marissa and new arrival Victoria. Marissa is not happy. Joey has a big question for Lorena and Ashley gets friendzoned.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: May The Best Man Win
programme.desc: Joey and Lorena are official but someone threatens their happiness. David gets cold feet with Lateysha. Ashley has some luck and Michael and Victoria get closer.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Head To Head
programme.desc: Itay finally realises he's lost the battle for Lorena. Ashley gets pied by Georgia. Ellie gets an apology she's been longing for and the Tablet Of Terror dishes up double trouble.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 105
programme.desc: Fitz hopes that confessing his love to his best friend Michelle will lead to love. Shelly thinks that her "clown" persona won't turn off her best friend as she asks him to be her boyfriend.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah struggles with taking Sophia to visit Derek's family. Ryan is annoyed that Maci has all the control over Bentley. Catelynn deals with anxiety when Nova meets Carly.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler finally say 'I do'! Maci and Taylor buy an online t-shirt business while Amber and Matt decide to flip houses. Farrah and Debra argue when Farrah lets her know she doesn't trust her to take care of Sophia.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah leaves for a month long business trip and has a last minute change of heart on who can watch Sophia while she is away. Maci and Ryan celebrate Bentleys 7th birthday together while Catelynn has post wedding blues.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Farrah returns from her trip and shares a life changing decision with her parents. Maci and Ryan celebrate Halloween as a family while Catelynn and Tyler go to Hawaii for their honeymoon. (S5, ep17)

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Simon comes back into Farrah's life and Catelynn and Tyler are concerned when Butch starts dating. Maci needs Taylor to step it up and Amber wants to take Leah on a trip. (S5, ep18)

programme.title: Hitler's Handmaidens
programme.desc: A look at the women surrounding Hitler once he came to power, and how they were held up as the Aryan Ideal to strive for once the Nazi dictator approved of their positions.

programme.title: Hitler's Handmaidens
programme.desc: How women were active - and often violent participants and perpetrators - in the conflict and its attendant atrocities - especially the Holocaust.

programme.title: Hitler's Handmaidens
programme.desc: Focusing on the fanatical women who took Hitler under their wing and, through love and devotion, acclimatised him to high society to launch him to power, only to be left behind once he achieved it.

programme.title: Hitler's Handmaidens
programme.desc: Cataloguing the many lovers of the Nazi dictator, and charting the unfortunate demise of all who dared resist his love, affection and sexual appetite.

programme.title: Hitler's Handmaidens
programme.desc: A look at the women surrounding Hitler once he came to power, and how they were held up as the Aryan Ideal to strive for once the Nazi dictator approved of their positions.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Thin Bluefin Line

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Final Fishdown

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Bite is On

programme.desc: Barrington Patterson is a man addicted to violence. After his father was sent to prison, Barrington’s teenage years were spent prowling football grounds looking for fights as a member of the Zulu Warriors - Birmingham City’s notorious hooligan gang

programme.title: Danny Dyer's Deadliest Men: Dominic Negus
programme.desc: Dominic’s fearsome reputation has been well earned. A world champion in both the professional and unlicensed circuits, Dominic made headlines after infamously head butting Audley Harrison when the pair clashed at Wembley.

programme.title: Britain's Toughest Towns
programme.desc: Belfast is unique amongst British cities in having paramilitary punishment squads that hand out summary justice. In this programme we will look at Belfast’s own unique style of mercenary justice…

programme.title: Britain's Toughest Towns
programme.desc: Nottingham is being plagued by a gun culture that is seeing an average of one person shot every week. In this programme we meet with drug dealers and the police officers who are trying to curb the escalating gun violence.

programme.title: Macintyre: Worlds toughest Towns: Istanbul
programme.desc: Istanbul is a mystical city of Mosques and spice bazaars, But Istanbul hides a much darker secret. According to the British foreign office, as much as 80% of all heroin used in Britain has come through Turkey via the notorious ‘Balkan Route.

programme.title: Macintyre: Worlds toughest Towns: Cape Town
programme.desc: Cape Town is one of the world's most popular tourist destinations. However, behind this picturesque setting hides a sinister underworld responsible for one of the highest incidents of rape, armed robbery and murder in the world

programme.desc: Barney & Betty Hill's abduction and the Zeta reticuli incident explored.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Valley of the Iguanasquat / Legend of Wiggly's Gold
programme.desc: When the campers discover a prehistoric valley near Stinky Pits they also find a cursed gem.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Lakebo-tron / Rise of the Dawn of the Beginning of the Planet of Armand!
programme.desc: McGee and Buttsquat go head-to-head in an 80's style arcade game! But as the points build up, the boys become digitized inside the game. The kids head back through the Lakebottom inter-dimensional portal, hoping to find a Sasquatch version of the camp.

programme.desc: Gretchen must confront her greatest and cutest fear.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: McGee.T / The Great Tiki Hunt

programme.desc: Beauty pageant Gretchen looks to connect with her girly side.

programme.title: WPT Classics

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Showdown at Sundown: Part I
programme.desc: When Yusei challenges Kalin to a duel, he hopes to save his old acquaintance from a terrible fate. However, the dueling gets dicey when it becomes clear that Kalin doesn't necessarily want to be saved!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Showdown at Sundown: Part II
programme.desc: As Yusei continues to duel his best to save Kalin from a most unhappy ending, he suddenly finds himself double crossed by his supposed allies and in desperate need of some saving of his own!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Race to Escape: Part I
programme.desc: After being double crossed and sent to the mines by his supposed allies, Yusei hatches a plan to escape. Can Yusei find a way out, or will he and Kalin be forced to work the mines forever?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Race to Escape: Part II
programme.desc: It's a high-speed minecart chase as Kalin and Yusei scramble to rescue Sergio's family from the clutches of the Crash Town mine. When Lawton and his goons gain up on the fleeing family, things take a heartbreaking turn.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Clash at Crash Town: Part I
programme.desc: The sinister Lawton has captured West and Nico and gained control of Crash Town, but Yusei and Kalin have no intention of letting him get away with it. It's the ultimate showdown as the dueling duo confront Lawton in a winner-takes-all battle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Clash at Crash Town: Part II
programme.desc: As the clash between Lawton, Yusei and Kalin comes to a climactic close, Yusei and Kalin must figure out a way to defeat Lawton before his deck destroys their dreams of freeing everyone in the mines.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Question of the Card
programme.desc: When Sherry breaks into a city building in search of answers about a very special duel card, she finds a lot more than she bargained for.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Keeping a Promise: Part I
programme.desc: When Crow looks to avenge a missing colleague, he ends up finding an old friend who turns out not to be what he seems.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Keeping a Promise: Part II
programme.desc: Crow takes on an old friend in a duel to determine the truth about a colleague's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Natural Instincts: Part I
programme.desc: A little fender bender turns into a friendly duel when Crow smashes into one of Team Unicorn's duelists on the tournament practice lanes only this was no accident and Team Unicorn's intentions are anything but friendly.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Natural Instincts: Part II
programme.desc: New threats are on the horizon and no one can be trusted. Sherry arrives to inform Yusei that she suspects the sinister forces of Iliaster have infiltrated the tournament.

programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Claw realizing Gadget isn't dead sends ghosts to kill him. Gadget tries to arrest the ghosts. Agents #1 and #2 are dressed as Ghost Catchers shooting rancid grease all over the mansion.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Clear Case
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget investigates mysterious ghosts in South America that are scaring off the miners. As usual it is the work of Dr. Claw.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Emerald Duck
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. The famous Emerald Duck is stolen from the temple of the Sungod. Inspector Gadget exposed the criminal and restores order.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Curse Of The Pharaoh (Poot-Ta-Foot'S Curse)

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Amazon

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: N.S.F. Gadget
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. With a black box controlled by his console, Dr. Claw schemes with the twin scientists, Null and Void, to intercept Metro City's bank transactions by manipulating their satellite transmissions.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Smelderado
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Dr. Stench, an agent of M.A.D., has invented a substance that makes gold smell terrible. Since smelly gold cannot be kept in bank vaults, it will be valueless in international markets.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Coo-Coo-Clock Caper
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget's mission is to safeguard the gold in the Swiss gold reserve and foil Dr. Claw's plants to steal the gold with the help of CooCooClock Maker.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: The Capeman Cometh
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Chief Quimby reveals to Inspector Gadget a MAD plot to steal Metro City's gold. Inspector Gadget is instructed to proceed to the mint and stop the robbery while Penny and Brain follow.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. M.A.D. is supposed to be the cause of the disappearing ships in the Bermuda Triangle. Inspector Gadget, Penny and Brain find the missing ships.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Amusement Park
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. M.A.D. agents have hidden a bomb in the amusement park in Metro City. With the bomb set to go off in a halfhour, M.A.D. is holding the city for ransom. Inspector Gadget must find the bomb.

programme.desc: Gary Wakefield and wife Nicky don't try to disguise themselves-they admit they are the fussiest house-hunters in the country.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7 Primetime
programme.desc: 24/7 Primetime is your essential daily guide to all the stories shaping your world. Anchored by CBS News' Elizabeth Cook, the show delivers the news you need to know.

programme.title: The Daily Report
programme.desc: The Daily Report on CBS News features original interviews and insights on the most important, urgent and interesting stories of the day.

programme.title: CBS Evening News

programme.title: CBS Evening News Plus
programme.desc: John Dickerson will guide viewers through the most impactful and important news of the day using in-depth conversations with CBS News journalists and contributors, as well as original reporting on national issues.

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett

programme.title: CBS Evening News
programme.desc: The CBS Evening News team shares the day's stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to the world.

programme.title: Arthur: I'm A Poet/The Scare-Your-Pants-Off Club
programme.desc: Challenged by Fern to enter a poetry contest, Arthur and his friends each write a poem to be judged by the famous poet Jack Prelutsky. Then, Arthur and his friends develop a consuming passion for the Scare-Your-Pants-Off books.

programme.title: Arthur: The Election/Francine Goes To War
programme.desc: There’s a mock election in Mr. Ratburn's class, but Muffy takes it seriously. How far will she go to win? Francine can't believe it. She gets in trouble no matter what she does -- thanks to the new nosy next-door neighbor!

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's New Puppy/Arthur Bounces Back
programme.desc: Arthur's new puppy is exactly what he wanted. He's cute and wriggly, and he follows Arthur everywhere. But training a puppy is harder than Arthur thought. Then, a mere $10 stands between Arthur and the shoes he's been dreaming about.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Writes A Story/Arthur's Lost Dog
programme.desc: Struggling with a school assignment, Arthur decides that his regular life is just too boring to write about. And, Arthur is the only one who believes in the superior intelligence of his dog. But even Arthur gets confused when Pal runs away.

programme.title: Arthur: Water and The Brain/Arthur The Unfunny
programme.desc: Is The Brain a snob? That seems to be the explanation for why he won't go to Waterworld with his friends. And, Arthur's a notorious joke-killer. But when he's scheduled to perform as a carnival clown, he learns how to make people laugh!

programme.title: Arthur: Home Sweet Home/Do You Believe in Magic
programme.desc: It’s time to celebrate summer! Join Arthur as he takes a family vacation and visits Grandpa Dave’s farm. Then, Arthur, D.W. and Buster spend a few days at the beach where they discover the simple joys of building sandcastles!

programme.title: Arthur: Fern and the Case of the Stolen Story/Sue Ellen Vegges Out
programme.desc: Fern has writer's block! Fortunately, Ladonna's full of stories, and Fern decides to "borrow" the tales and simply change the names. Then, when Sue Ellen decides to stop eating meat, Muffy and Francine compete to be the best vegetarian.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s New Best Friend/Freaky Tuesday
programme.desc: D.W. meets 13-year-old Hana, who is much older and totally cool! Is Hana D.W's new BFF? Then, Buster is convinced teachers have it easy. Can he put himself in Mr. Ratburn’s shoes to find out what it’s like to be a teacher?

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Who's Your Neighbor?
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: This Way In, This Way Out!
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Big Garden - Get Happy
programme.desc: Baby Bop wants Barney, BJ and the kids to play with her instead of working in their garden. They promise to play with her as soon as they finish. Baby Bop can't wait, and tries many ways to get them to come play with her now, none of which work.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Play Games!
programme.desc: It's fun and games with Barney and his friends! BJ's favorite way of getting exercise is by playing sports and games. When Baby Bop is shy about trying new games, Barney and his friends show her how tee-rific trying something new can be.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Cousin Riff is moving to town. Barney encourages everyone to put on a special show.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Grace’s food drive isn’t going very well until Melanie offers to help. Melanie comes up with the perfect idea to get people to donate – put on a movie premiere in the caboose!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Movement - Separation
programme.desc: When some children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race, BJ and Baby Bop decide he'll need their help. They show him several ways to get ready for the big race by warming up and stretching.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's A Happy Day!
programme.desc: Beth has invented a brand-new holiday called "Happy Day," in which everyone gets to make a wish for something which will make them happy—and everyone else tries to make that wish come true! Barney and the kids discuss feelings and facial expressions.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Squares, Squares Everywhere
programme.desc: Nick's homework is to find as many squares as he can. It's great fun when Barney and the kids help!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Something He Ate
programme.desc: The Bee Teamers return to the Scrapyard with their Decepticon captives, and find the place completely trashed. Sideswipe, Strongarm, and Grimlock balk at being assigned clean-up duty, asserting that they're warriors, not janitors.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Sick as a Bot
programme.desc: The Autobots suffer serious malfunctions after the Decepticon WINGCODE exposes them to harmful nanoparticles in an attempt to get her claws on the team's stash of Energon Cubes.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Five Fugitives
programme.desc: The Bee Team is about to catch their nemesis Steeljaw when they are interrupted by Strongarm's old mentor DROPFORGE, who arrives from Cybertron with orders to arrest them.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Enemy of my Enemy
programme.desc: Unannounced, Optimus returns to the scrapyard with an All-Star team of Autobot allies: Ratchet, Windblade, and Jazz, as well as Drift and his Mini-Cons.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Freedom Fighters
programme.desc: Surrounded and outgunned on Cybertron, the Bee Team and Steeljaw are in danger of seeing their mission to overthrow the oppressive High Council go up in smoke.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Transform And Roll Out! Part 1

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Buried in Debt

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Breaking Up is Hard to Do

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Murder Too Close to Home

programme.desc: PRS checks into the Knickerbocker Hotel in Linesville, Pennsylvania where the owners are reporting strange noises and the appearance of phantom children in some of the rooms.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Glove
programme.desc: When a terrifying haunting threatens to break a Daisytown, PA couple apart, PRS is their last resort. As the investigation deepens, PRS and the family learn that it's just the tip of iceberg, turns out this haunting might be all in the family.

programme.title: Paranormal State: School House Haunting
programme.desc: PRS travels to Massachusetts to investigate an old schoolhouse where children's voices disturb a couple who've made it their home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Supernatural Seduction
programme.desc: PRS investigates the Campbell House, where the Innkeeper and guests claim to have sexual encounters with a spirit who has deep ties to a family tragedy.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Good Vs. Evil
programme.desc: PRS visits a western Pennsylvania couple wracked by a torrent of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Freshmen Fear
programme.desc: A young female student claims to have seen a ghost in her dorm room.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Hill House_PT1
programme.desc: What was once a private home before becoming a sanctuary for the elderly, the abandoned Hill House is now an eerie shadow of its former glory, that houses empty rooms, strange noises and a plethora of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Hill House_PT2
programme.desc: Part one saw the team seemingly getting stalked by something, and in this part it shows its hand.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Village Church Farm
programme.desc: A museum like no other, this small collection of antiquated buildings is said to be the home of several spirits. The team get more than they bargained for as objects move; strange noises are caught on camera and the best EVP response to date.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Old Nick Theatre
programme.desc: Once a prison and a police station and now a theatre the Old Nick is famous for its unexplained occurrences. Fred decides to summon up some extra help while objects move and something wants to make itself known.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Black Country Living Museum
programme.desc: The team have a whole village to investigate with results that amazed the all. With a playful spirit communicating through the Ouija board and the EVP machine at the same time the team seem to have their first two-way conversation with the dead.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Land, Titan, The Diary, Town of Remembrance, The House on Barry Avenue.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 5
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Needle Point, Toy to the Rescue, Mystery Lock, The House on Baker Street, The Train.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 11
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Bon Voyage, The Man in the Model T, The Scoop, Angel on Board, Buenos Dias.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Motorcycle, Blind Man's Dog, Deer Hunters, Tribal Curse, The Card Game.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Connie, Positive I.D., Trucker, Cook Out, The New House.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 3
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Out of Service, When I Was Big, The Greedy Investor, Seven Hours of Bad Luck, The Secret of the Coins.

programme.title: A Haunting: Shape Of Evil
programme.desc: Jay Yaple persuades his wife that Enfield, CT, is the perfect place for them. After a series of unexplained events, Jay discovers the house has a dark history of mysterious deaths. Anyone who attempts to come to their aid is driven away by the demon.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Never Dies
programme.desc: Jennifer Hoke’s family found their dream home along the waterfront in Florida; little do they know something dark is lurking in their dream house. What starts as strange noises escalates to physical attacks. The family turns to a local empath for answers.

programme.title: A Haunting: Black Magic
programme.desc: During the renovation of her 150-year-old Pennsylvania home, Debbie Guy accepts the old house has a ghost and they will have to live with it. But when family members are tormented by an evil entity, Debbie seeks the help of paranormal investigators.

programme.title: A Haunting: Face Of Evil
programme.desc: Joy, a working mother of three, assumes a girl's weekend at a haunted plantation will be a pleasant change of pace. But after she returns, her youngest child's sleep is shattered by the ominous presence of a dark phantom.

programme.title: A Haunting: Gateway to Hell
programme.desc: Bobby Mackey has heard tales that the river by his club draws Satanists to the area.

programme.title: A Haunting: Eternal Grief
programme.desc: Shortly after moving into her home in Indiana, Jennifer Patterson receives a warning from a stranger that she is not alone in the house. When she hears strange voices, she begins to wonder if the previous owner, who died in the house, still inhabits it.

programme.desc: Fred encounters some small creatures who have lost their homes and asks his friends to help find them a new one. Through her research in a book, Bubble discovers that the creatures' original home is made of gold thread.

programme.title: Tulipop

programme.title: Horns
programme.desc: A man wakes up after the death of his girlfriend to find he has grown horns.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: A crew of miniature aliens operate a spaceship that has a human form

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Malcolm Turner and his stepson Trent go undercover at an all-girls performing arts school

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Old-school salesmen Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) try to reboot their careers by joining Google’s fiercely competitive internship program — with hilarious results!

programme.title: The Rewrite
programme.desc: A once successful British screenwriter finds himself teaching at a U.S. college where he falls for one of his students who's a single mom.

programme.title: The Raven
programme.desc: The sorcerer Craven learns from fellow magician Dr. Bedlo that his supposedly dead wife is alive and living at the castle of master sorcerer Dr. Scarabus.

programme.title: Bowery at Midnight
programme.desc: Kindly soup kitchen operator and professor of criminology, Karl Wagner, uses his soup kitchen as a front for a criminal gang. When things get out of hand, Wagner kills his henchmen, who wind up as zombies in the cellar of the soup kitchen.

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: A young farmer sets out to recruit mercenaries to defend his peaceful planet, which is under threat of invasion by the evil tyrant Sador and his armada of aggressors. Starring: George Peppard, Robert Vaughn, Richard Thomas

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Johnny Ringo's Girl
programme.desc: Ringo's girlfriend is trying to get him to turn his life around, so he goes to Old Man Clanton and tells him he wants to leave the gang.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Lion of Idaho
programme.desc: Attorney William E. Borah defends a woman charged with murder in Nampa, Idaho.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Debt
programme.desc: A friendship grows between a wounded bandit and a French-Canadian engineer who nurses him back to health.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Train and Lucy Tutaine
programme.desc: When her cow is killed by a train, Lucy Tutaine is outraged by the indifference to her financial loss.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Grotto of Death
programme.desc: A mine operator insists on having his workers continue in unsafe conditions that are prone to cave-ins.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Diamond Jim Brady
programme.desc: Diamond Jim Brady is traveling through Texas by railroad and waging wild bets along the way.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Phantom Procession
programme.desc: A cowboy explores a valley allegedly haunted by monks that were massacred a century earlier.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: With Honesty and Integrity
programme.desc: A Native acquitted of murder under Sioux law must contend with the white man's 'lynch law' justice.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Coffin for a Coward
programme.desc: A Civil War veteran tries to rid his hometown of terrorists.

programme.title: The Battle of Midway: Dauntless
programme.desc: A U.S. carrier group is positioned off the coast of Midway in June 1942. During the battle, the two-man crew of a U.S. Navy dive bomber is forced to ditch in the sea. Amid the vast openness of the Pacific, the men are forced to face their own mortality.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: The classic comedy with cool stars and even cooler cars! Based on a true race event, Burt Reynolds leads an all-star cast in the ultimate quest to win The Cannonball Run.

programme.title: Gold
programme.desc: A ruthless global cabal of financial investors plan to manipulate the price of gold by flooding one of South Africa’s top gold mines. Starring: Roger Moore, Susannah York, Ray Milland, Bradford Dillman, Bernard Horsfall, John Hussey

programme.title: Heist: Heist
programme.desc: A casino card dealer, desperate to pay for his daughter's life-saving surgery, teams up with a co-worker to pull off a casino heist, but as the plan falters they find themselves hijacking a bus and using the hostages as collateral.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: As she lay dying, a woman gives the only witness to her murder her daughter's journal, implying that her attacker may also be responsible for her child's death. Before giving the journal to the police, the witness makes a copy for herself.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: After a radio talk show host takes to the airwaves to discuss recent slayings of lonely women aboard cruise ships, she receives information that leads her to believe she knows the killer and may be the next target.

programme.title: Two Came Back
programme.desc: Susan is a seasoned sailor who agrees to help her friends bring a client's 68-foot boat from San Diego to Vancouver. After sailing the boat into a storm with disastrous consequences, the group is challenged to survive. Feat: Melissa Joan Hart.

programme.title: Children Of Dune
programme.desc: The twins of Paul "Muad'dib" Atreides become embroiled in the political landscape of Arrakis ("Dune") and the rest of the universe. PART 3 of 3. Feat: James McAvoy & Susan Sarandon.

programme.title: Time Runners
programme.desc: Special Agent Sally Biggs has a secret, she can rewind time whenever she wants. It's enough to make her a celebrity at the FBI and allows her to control almost everything in her life... Except for the disappearance of her husband.

programme.title: The Four Warriors
programme.desc: Travelling home, four soldiers discover a village gripped by fear, as residents are abducted by unknown predators. These warriors set out to rescue them and destroy what lurks outside the village.

programme.title: Windstorm
programme.desc: Rebel teen Mika encounters a beautiful, wild stallion named Windstorm at her grandmother's riding school and learns she can communicate with horses.

programme.title: The BFG: The Original Movie
programme.desc: A young orphan girl, Sophie, gets taken away to a faraway land populated by Giants and Dreams.

programme.title: Heidi

programme.title: Elvira's Movie Macabre The Werewolf of Washington
programme.desc: While on assignment in Hungary, a young reporter is attacked by a mysterious animal. (1981)

programme.title: Monster Squad: Mr. Mephisto

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Tickler
programme.desc: The Tickler passes off counterfeit bills in an attempt to lure the Monster Squad into a trap.

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Ringmaster

programme.title: Monster Squad

programme.title: Monster Squad: The Astrologer
programme.desc: During a newscast, The Astrologer announces that an earthquake is about to devastate the land, and to ensure his prediction comes true, he makes plans to detonate an atomic bomb.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Shop Till You Drop
programme.desc: Mac and the CSI New York team search for the killer of a department store manager found dead in a holiday display window.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team investigate the body of a woman dressed in a ballgown found in a lake.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Bodies discovered relate to a psychopath re-enacting the game of Clue in real life.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The owner of a popular bar is killed and robbed.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Two people are killed with a gun printed from a computer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team use the art of interrogation when a beloved off-duty NYPD officer dies.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Smoke Gets In Your CSIs
programme.desc: Calleigh is in a coma after a smoke inhalation injury sustained while investigating a case involving a dead doctor, drug dealers, and black market organ transplants.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Bad Seed
programme.desc: Delko returns to the team following an extended absence through injury.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A wedding takes a wrong turn when the bride is missing her groom.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a fatal car accident.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Kill Clause
programme.desc: The CSIs suspect a company is killing its employees in order to profit.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A body falls from the sky and the team discover it is from a commercial space flight.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate two murders that take place at the annual bull riding rodeo in Las Vegas.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and his team battle the flu when they are called upon by DDA Klein to investigate the deaths of several key witnesses for a grand jury case against a dangerous Las Vegas gang.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The disturbing death of a 3-year-old girl has a great impact on Catherine as she searches for clues to her murder.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Brass and Nick get help from an unlikely source, an incarcerated criminal (Method Man), when investigating two murders that take place in the same apartment building.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and his team discover several victims who have green blood, leading them to the conclusion that their deaths are somehow connected.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and the CSI team become involved in the world of Hollywood comedy when a diva sitcom star (Sagal) meets an untimely demise while filming her show in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Scorpion: Tech, Drugs, and Rock 'n Roll
programme.desc: Walter's attempt to "normalize" goes horribly wrong when a nefarious virus is uploaded to his computer.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crazy Train
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must stop a sabotaged runaway subway train with Paige and Ralph on board. Also, in his attempt to impress Happy, Toby has his first boxing match.

programme.title: Scorpion: Area 51
programme.desc: To help fund Walter's research into saving his sister's life, Team Scorpion takes a lucrative job for the CIA to find a top-secret aircraft in the mysterious Area 51.

programme.title: Scorpion: US vs. UN vs. UK
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is blackmailed to break into the United Nations to assist in the assassination of a menacing arms dealer.

programme.title: Scorpion: Arrivals And Departures
programme.desc: When Team Scorpion and Walter's parents visit Megan in the hospital as her health deteriorates, they are quarantined after a deadly fungus outbreak threatens to infect everyone.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The fate of the human race hangs in the balance when the Witch Queen (Julie Engelbrecht) rises from the dead, seeking revenge against Kaulder (Vin Diesel), the immortal warrior who slayed her centuries ago.

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: A college student (Tom Hanks) begins to live the role he plays with three friends in a medieval fantasy game.

programme.title: Bridge to Terabithia
programme.desc: A boy (Josh Hutcherson) and his new friend (AnnaSophia Robb), the class outsider, create an imaginary world in which they rule as king and queen.

programme.title: The Princess Bride
programme.desc: A storybook stableboy turns pirate (Cary Elwes) and rescues his beloved (Robin Wright), who is about to marry a dreadful prince.

programme.title: Kidnapped
programme.desc: Robert Louis Stevenson's hero David Balfour joins rebel Alan Breck Stewart in 18th-century Scotland.

programme.title: That Hamilton Woman
programme.desc: The ill-fated romance of Horatio Lord Nelson and Emma Hamilton, wife of the British Ambassador to Naples. Made during WWII, the film was clearly meant to raise the morale of British audiences and was said to have been Churchill's favourite film.

programme.title: The Magic Box
programme.desc: Biography of British film pioneer William Friese-Greene, who designed and patented a working cinematic camera at the expense of his domestic life. He was largely ignored by the commercial industry until the publication of a controversial biography.

programme.title: Medium: Baby Fever
programme.desc: In the 100th episode, an infant is kidnapped from Allison's neighborhood, and she becomes so determined to find the child that Joe fears she may have become obsessed.

programme.title: Medium: Bite Me
programme.desc: Allison's nightmares put her in scenes from the classic movie Night of the Living Dead, and cause her to awaken with strange bite marks and cuts, as well as clues related to the murder of a funeral director.

programme.title: Medium: New Terrain
programme.desc: Allison rents an SUV after her car gets damaged; she discovers that the SUV's satellite radio lets her hear other people's conversations.

programme.title: Medium: The Future's So Bright
programme.desc: After strangely becoming sensitive to light, Allison wears a pair of sunglasses that display strange numbers which may be related to people's life expectancies.

programme.title: Medium: You Give Me Fever
programme.desc: Allison's visions become a vital source of information to the authorities after samples of a deadly disease disappear. Meanwhile, Scanlon thinks he's ready to ask Lynn to marry him.

programme.title: Medium: An Everlasting Love
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a serial killer case dies, and the police are convinced he's the guilty party. When the dead suspect contacts Allison, he tells her that he's innocent and agrees to help her find the real killer.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: As Donna gets ready to walk down the aisle, things changed drastically. She learns some surprising news regarding a mentor she once worked with.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One must figure out how to get a Chinatown gang to release a local shop owner, then they also have to figure out how to get the one who shot the owner's daughter free as well.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: An ex-cop with a grudge against Greg Parker takes him hostage and threatens to drop him off an arena's megatron if Greg can't talk him down. Meanwhile his team discovers that they are helpless to use tactical options to save their boss.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: When Spike answers Sam's sister's desperate plea for help, he is forced, at gunpoint, to help two criminals steal evidence from the fortress that is the Metro Evidence Depot.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One is called in to try and stop a conflict at a psychiatric hospital where a stabbing has just taken place.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Greg Parker immediately faces suspension from the team after keeping the relationship between two team members a secret.

programme.title: Left Behind
programme.desc: A small group of survivors are left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

programme.title: 16 Blocks
programme.desc: From director of action blockbuster Lethal Weapon, Richard Donner. Personal demons put cop Jack (Bruce Willis - Die Hard) at rock bottom but he wasn’t about to let a witness be murdered on his watch.

programme.title: Barely Lethal
programme.desc: While on a mission, Megan Walsh, an assassin, gets intrigued with the lives of the other teenagers who are her age. She decides to fake her own death and enroll herself in a school. Starring: Jessica Alba, Samuel L. Jackson, Sophie Turner, Jaime King

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Gone Fishin' / A Little Body of Work
programme.desc: Young Randy is reluctant to accompany his Uncle Ned on a fishing trip. / Delinquents Eddie and Herman have a bad habit of stealing parts for their hot rod from cars on the street.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Sleeping Beauty
programme.desc: Self-centered and conceited Prince Charming has only two goals in life: to look maahvelous, daaahling, and to reach the castle of Sleeping Beauty in order to kiss her out of her spell.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Avenging Phantom / Myth Conceptions

programme.desc: Seventeen year old Nathan is a star athlete who would do anything to play pro basketball.

programme.desc: Convinced that his Aunt Melva is too old and helpless to live on her own, a young city boy named Dale drives out to the "sticks" to retrieve her.

programme.desc: Wendell has had his share of bullying from pranksters Chet and Louie.

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: The Brothers Gruff

programme.title: Tales from the Cryptkeeper: Uncle Harry's Horrible House of Horrors
programme.desc: Uncle Harry is a miserable old grump who wouldn't know how to have a good time if it ran up and bit him.

programme.desc: Holly dates a much younger man and Eden questions his motives. Phil and Eden secretly become friends with benefits. Stuart convinces Haskell to pursue a woman he's admired from afar and ends up accidentally stealing her cat.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil and Eden's relationship is strained when he is named one of the top ten bachelors in New York City and has to pretend to be single. Stuart dates the twin sister of his evil ex, Sabrina.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Killers
programme.desc: They were too young to drink or vote but they were not too young to commit the most brutal of crimes. Some were driven by pure curiosity: how would it feel to take a life?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women who kill husbands, lovers, rivals and parents will shock society. But a very special horror is reserved for women who will kill their own.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: We want to believe that all women would give their lives to protect their children. But there are horrifying cases when a mother will turn against her natural instinct and kill her own flesh and blood.

programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Running on Empty
programme.desc: Dog's time is running out in Colorado. After a month of helping his bail bondsmen friends around Denver, he's got to get his family back home to Hawaii. But Dog wants one more capture before they leave.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Inside Out
programme.desc: Dog kickstarts the search for Jackson, a 240lbs, six feet tall bad boy who has skipped out on a $10,000 bond. Jackson’s apparently at his father-in-law's house, but the father-in-law has info about Jackson that brings Dog to a unique hideout.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Growing Up Is Hard To Do
programme.desc: With twelve kids of his own, Dog knows how hard it is to keep children on the straight and narrow, especially during their turbulent teens.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Year of the Dog

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Mystery of Mona Lisa

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rusty Cuffs
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: The Game: Let Them Eat (Cup) Cake!
programme.desc: While Melanie is away interviewing for a residency position at Johns Hopkins in D.C., Derwin does everything he can to avoid returning to an empty home.

programme.title: Run's House: Mixed and Mastered

programme.title: Run's House: Too Cool for Old School

programme.desc: Justine's Brown Sugar jewelry line is up and running. And better yet, the Home Shopping Network is interested in working with her. So it's off to sunny Tampa to put Justine's jewelry on air.

programme.title: Run's House: Baby Comes Home

programme.title: Run's House: Pass The Frame

programme.desc: Meet a feral dog who likes to guard pregnant horses on a ranch. English bulldog Rocco joins an existing pack and targets one of his brothers. A rescued pit bull terrier is a couch potato.

programme.desc: Geoff Britten captains the Ninja Brittens; Michelle Warnky and brothers Chris and Brian Wilczewski comprise the Lab Rats; Elet Hall captains the Elet-Tricks; Daniel Gil leads the Iron Grips.

programme.title: Team Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The winners of three previous qualifying rounds and one wild card team compete in order to advance to the Team Ninja Warrior Championship Relay.

programme.title: Team Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The winners of three previous qualifying rounds and one wild card team compete to advance to the Team Ninja Warrior Championship Relay; the two final teams meet and the winner is crowned.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stepping Hill
programme.desc: An inside look at the series of mysterious deaths that occurred at Stepping Hill Hospital in Stockport, Greater Manchester, in 2011.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Wrongly Released
programme.desc: This special episode shines a light on criminals who have been brought to justice for one crime only to be released to commit further terrible acts.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Gemma McCluskie
programme.desc: The harrowing story of EastEnders actress Gemma McCluskie, who was murdered by her older brother in the flat they shared in east London in 2012.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Ann Maguire
programme.desc: The tragic story of Ann Maguire, who was stabbed to death by a teenage pupil while teaching a Spanish lesson at Corpus Christi Catholic College in Leeds.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stephen Port
programme.desc: A chilling look at the crimes of Stephen Port, the east London serial killer who poisoned four young men with lethal doses of a date rape drug.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: John Sweeney
programme.desc: John Sweeney brutally murdered two of his girlfriends, dismembered their bodies and dumped them in canals. In a macabre twist, he hid clues in his abstract paintings, and five other girlfriends of his are currently still missing.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Red Desert
programme.desc: In this episode of Wild Places, we join botanist Peter Latz, who believes the biggest influence on the Australian arid landscape has been fire. Years ago, Peter wondered how different this country would have looked like without the influence of it.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Iceland: Land of Fire and Ice
programme.desc: Iceland is a land born out of fire, sculpted by ice. This unique island is home to some of the planet's rarest and most spectacular creatures and it harbors some of the most extreme environments on Earth.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Sahara: Life on the Edge
programme.desc: Watch Africa's Cape Coast that goes from the frigid waters of Cape Point to the sub-tropic seas of Kwazulu-Natal./After, see Africa's Dark Heart in the Congo which is seething with innumerable species./Last,learn about the largest desert in the world.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Patagonia is a place of extremes  of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts, and violent oceans. Survival here means being tough enough to cope with brutal winters, and canny enough to exploit brief seasons of plenty.

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Arctic Ocean: The Frozen Sea
programme.desc: The film follows a year in the High Arctic, where life is exceptionally entwined with the seasons. Journey to the Arctic where in winter, the sun doesn't rise for months on end, but in the summer thaws out in an explosion of life.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: When Rick Hunter, a renegade cop who takes justice into his own hands, partners with the stunning and rebellious Sgt. McCall, they set out to crack down on L.A.'s slimiest criminals.
