programme.title: Happy Days: My Cousin the Cheat
programme.desc: Fonzie is furious with his rebellious cousin, Chachi Arcola, after Chachi cheats on a school test using answers stolen from a tutoring session with Joanie Cunningham.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Fair Fonzie
programme.desc: Snobby Cynthia Holmes schemes with her obnoxious cousin, Skippy, to make the Fonz look foolish at a country club soirée.

programme.title: Happy Days: Bye Bye Blackball
programme.desc: Richie, Ralph, and Potsie endure the harassment of "hell week" to prove themselves worthy to enter their college fraternity, Phi Kappa Nu.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Almost Dies
programme.desc: What begins as a humorous escapade with a motorcycle turns into a tragic vigil for the Cunninghams and their friends.

programme.title: Happy Days: Do You Want to Dance
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days: The First Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Members of the Happy Days gang find themselves transformed into Pilgrims when Marion dreams of reviving the true spirit of Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1938, Nazi Germany annexed Austria. Hitler seized the Spear of Destiny, a Roman spearhead believed to hold power from Christ's crucifixion. He paraded it in Nuremberg to assert authority, but by 1945, amid Germany's ruin, the spear had vanished.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Richard Knight, an actor and laborer, became obsessed with Captain Kidd's treasure. He found clues in old maps and located a potential site in Communist Vietnam's Hon Tre Lon. Despite risks, he and Fred Graham journeyed there, only to be captured.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: King Solomon ruled Israel 3,000 years ago, famed for a visit from the Queen of Sheba. The quest for Solomon's gold spans millennia. Karl Mauch believed he found Ophir in southern Africa. Yet, the search for Solomon's true mines persists.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1941, Germany looted the Amber Room, an extraordinary art installation from the Soviet Union, deemed the eighth wonder of the world. Taken to Konigsberg, it vanished by war's end, sparking a decades-long hunt.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The Honjo Masamune, Japan's greatest sword, vanished after WWII. Taken as a souvenir by a US Sergeant, it's now a legendary lost artifact sought by collectors worldwide.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Herbert Armstrong, convicted in 1922 of murdering his wife, he was the first and only solicitor to be hung in UK. But was he guilty?

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC
programme.desc: From the Zeros that bombed Pearl Harbor to the rocket that could take humans to Mars, discover the secrets inside the Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Chateau of Versailles, Paris
programme.desc: From the schemes of Marie Antoinette to the spectrum of a star that reveals the origin of human life, discover the secrets inside the Chateau of Versailles.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London
programme.desc: From the musket shot that killed Admiral Nelson to an anti-piracy commando raid, discover the secrets inside the National Maritime Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Bardo Museum, Tunisia
programme.desc: From the real lives of gladiators to the connection between Star Wars and Tunisia, discover the secrets inside the Bardo Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto
programme.desc: From a medieval hand-grenade to an extremely rare dinosaur, discover the secrets inside the Royal Ontario Museum.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Desert Monsoon
programme.desc: Enlisting the help of fellow storm chaser R.J. Evans, George heads to Arizona to photograph spectacular lightning storms triggered by the desert monsoon season. R.J. however is known as "America's noisiest athiest" for his free-thought radio show.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Monsoon
programme.desc: In India's monsoon season George wades through waist-deep water in Bombay and leach-filled waterfalls in Goa, finds people being swept away by rivers, and rebuilding bridges. He experiences an intense annual Hindu celebration.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Venezuela Lightning
programme.desc: Gas from Catatumbo swamps mixed with cold air from the Andes create a perpetual lightning storm on South America's largest lake. From here George canoes 84 km to world's highest waterfall, swims with piranhas and holds a huge Anaconda.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Timbuktu: Birthplace of Hurricanes
programme.desc: Dust storms can spin off from Africa into the Atlantic and morph into tropical hurricanes that threaten the Caribbean and USA. While searching for Timbuktu's dust storms, George finds adventure in the landscape and culture of West Africa.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Defying Gravity
programme.desc: George experiences extremes of aviation and space training aboard Czech-built Albatross fighter jet, inside Zero-G plane, simulating zero gravity by diving 30,000 feet in giant parabolas and in spinning centrifuges producing 6 G's of force.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Under Pressure
programme.desc: After submarine exploration of Grand Cayman Island, George dives with Canadian Armed Forces' experimental deep pressure unit. With explorers Chris Harvey-Clark and Phil Nuytten he investigates newly discovered "Black Smoker" deep sea vents.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Costa Rica
programme.desc: George explores the volcanoes of Costa Rica with an international team of scientists, rafts down white water rivers in full flood, rappels down raging waterfalls, and handles some of deadliest snakes this tropical country has to offer.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Iceland: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: George meets President of Iceland Ólafur Grímsson who spearheaded use of geothermal power; visits Blue Lagoon and geysers; explores volcanically active Haimaey Island and climbs an iceberg calving off the glaciers at Vatnajokull Lagoon.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Avalanches
programme.desc: Whenever there is unstable snow and gravity, gravity always wins. George travels to the Rocky Mountains to learn about how to stay alive in the back country.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Tornadoes
programme.desc: George embarks on his annual pilgrimage to the "Tornado Alley" area of the central U.S. to guide groups of people who want to witness the brute force of tornadoes in action

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: The Rise of the Sycophants
programme.desc: Albert Speer: Favouritism, Envy and Betrayal in Hitler’s inner circle.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: Beginning of the End
programme.desc: Germany is losing the war, Hitler’s inner circle plot against the regime.

programme.title: Hitler's Circle of Evil: Meltdown
programme.desc: The day of reckoning has arrived. The Nazi inner circle plots their escape.

programme.title: Hitler's Mega Plane
programme.desc: In January 2012 Italian divers discovered the wreck of a massive plane off the coast of Sardinia. At a depth of 65 meters (213 feet) lies a Messerschmidt “Gigant”.

programme.title: Hitler's People: Conformity
programme.desc: Nazi Germany 10 years before the 1944 assassination attempt: it’s the era just after the seizure of power, when enforced conformity becomes part of all aspects of life.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Australian Alps
programme.desc: It may come as a surprise to non-Australians that the island continent renowned for its flat plains and searing deserts has snow-capped mountains at all.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators: The Wolf Pack is Back
programme.desc: The wolf is performing a spectacular come back in the mountains of Italy.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The wide, often untouched wilderness of the Baltic hinterland is home to many animals. More than 35 brown bears live in the primeval forests of Alutaguse. In the spring, the Soomaa National Park transforms into a huge lake.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators: Italian Bears
programme.desc: No one would have bet on the result of the introduction of seven Slovenian bears, two males and five females, in the woods of Adamello, in Trentino.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Islands can be home to the most extreme examples of life, the wildest of people and the most dramatic landscapes. Natural selection fuels evolution in the most dramatic way

programme.title: Full Custom Garage: Ten Ton Truck
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel takes on a vintage military transport truck.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Full Custom Garage

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel looks back on the Best Builds of season 1

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Master metal man Ian Roussel hammers down on the best builds of season 2

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Master metal man Ian Roussel is back at it, as one of his most eccentric clients throws down the challenge on a lead sled transformation

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Mystery of Mona Lisa
programme.desc: When Lyssa points out that the fugitive in the next case has the same birth date as Barbara, Dog's recently deceased daughter, the team takes a special vow to capture the young woman.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rusty Cuffs
programme.desc: Dog finds himself fighting two enemies; the law and his inner demons. He continues his legal battle to fight extradition to Mexico in connection with his 2003 capture of fugitive rapist Andrew Luster. His other struggle is private.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Make a Wish
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children, then starting the search for Jacob, a fugitive who's abandoned his wife and children.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Tough Love
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Surprise Ending
programme.desc: Dog and the boys are going after a fugitive with a $25,000 bond and a string of theft charges behind him. When the team hits his apartment, they find a boot print on the door, a souvenir of a police raid from only days earlier?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Big Wipe-Out
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: You Can Bet On It!
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Fly Boy
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Guns & Ice
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Si-Yonara
programme.desc: The Duck Commander assembly room gets an unexpected shakeup when a disgruntled Si decides to quit his job.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Fowl Play
programme.desc: Willie finds his office in shambles and alerts the authorities that the warehouse has had a break in.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sweatin' Bullets
programme.desc: When a heat wave envelops West Monroe the air conditioning unit at the Duck Commander warehouse goes down, turning the duck call assembly room into a boiling sweatshop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Spring Pong Cleaning
programme.desc: After Korie decides the junk piles in the Duck Commander warehouse are beginning to reach critical mass, she calls on Willie and the guys to do a little company spring-cleaning.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Morning, West Monroe
programme.desc: After attending a local radio show as a guest, Willie sees an opportunity to host a show of his own.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Of Mattresses and Men
programme.desc: The Jase, Si and the guys from the duck call room take a field trip to a brand new local donut shop and quickly find out who amongst them can eat the most delicious treats.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Samurai Si
programme.desc: Willie receives a special gift from a Japanese business associate - a "priceless" samurai sword, which Willie keeps out of the hands of Jase and the guys.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck No, We Won't Go
programme.desc: Willie pushes his work force too far after implementing new "motivational work tactics," and the guys rise up against him and go on strike.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drag Me To Glory
programme.desc: When NASCAR sensation Clint Bowyer pays a visit to the Duck Commander warehouse, Willie and the guys are fired up to spend the day hanging out with the professional racecar driver.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Season Eve
programme.desc: Tomorrow is the opening day of Duck Season and the men are carrying on their tradition of camping on the Robertson Land the night before.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Can't Hardly Weight
programme.desc: Gearing up for his high school reunion, Willie realizes that he could stand to lose a few pounds. Jase and Korie set out to help him drop some weight and the strenuous battle of man-versus-waistline begins.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Going Home, Going Home
programme.desc: Mark is in a state between life and death when he's critically injured in a car accident. Jonathan takes Mark back to childhood to give him a second chance to tell his grandfather how much he loves him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: As Difficult as ABC
programme.desc: Jonathan steps in when a heart condition sidelines a promising basketball player's dreams.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Child of God
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are on hand when a dying woman attempts a reconciliation with her estranged father. She is a single mother who wants her family to take the child.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Match Made in Heaven
programme.desc: Scotty is a lovelorn quadriplegic with a successful law practice. Jonathan is happy to play cupid, but Mark isn't so thrilled about it, because the woman in question is his cousin.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Banker and The Bum
programme.desc: A greedy banker and a good-hearted bum switch places. The bum dies, but the banker is now infused with love and generosity.

programme.title: Encounter: UFO: Abductions
programme.desc: These are first-hand experiences of the most terrifying kind: stories shot through with mystery, fear and endless questions.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 13
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Explore the increase in UFO sightings that occurred during the spring of 1952.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 9
programme.desc: We have always been told that mankind enjoys free will. Is this really true or have aliens created the means for controlling humanity?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: UFO Zones: Journey to the world's hottest UFO zones, where physical and paranormal phenomenons and unidentified objects and aliens are reported with alarming frequency.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Aliens and the Vatican
programme.desc: Recently-declassified FBI files cast new light on the existence of aliens, as well as question whether the Vatican could be hiding proof of extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Arraignment
programme.desc: Krystle's dizzy spells force her to see a doctor; Jackie remembers seeing the La Mirage blaze start in Claudia's room, proving Blake's innocence; Blake receives a letter from Caress, pleading for his help.

programme.title: Dynasty: Romance
programme.desc: Blake's trip to Caracas to free Caress proves unsuccessful; Dex's proposal of marriage to Alexis is rejected; Blake catches Michael Culhane and Amanda in a passionate embrace and immediately fires the promiscuous chauffeur.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake and Dex's plan to free Caress from prison succeed, as she returns to Denver with a fever for revenge; Sammy Jo is pregnant with Clay's baby and warns Steven no court would deny her custody of Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Choice
programme.desc: Caress vows retribution for her years of imprisonment; Michael Culhane uses Zach Powers to acquire thirty percent of "The Crater" project; Sammy Jo tells a distraught Clay of her pregnancy; Caress blackmails Emily Falimont.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Secret
programme.desc: Caress continues to extort Emily Fallmont; Clay, suffering from guilt, proposes marriage to Sammy Jo, Las Vega style; Michael is forced to tell Amanda the truth; Emily tells Buck of her past with Ben and fleeing from his rage.

programme.title: Brothers In Arms
programme.desc: The young men who joined up together, fought together and died together in World War One.

programme.title: D-Day: Secret Raids That Won The War
programme.desc: Examining the RAF 617 squadron and their history of operations throughout the war.

programme.title: Embedded 45' - Shooting War in Germany: Embedded 45 - Shooting War in Germany 1
programme.desc: This first episode covers the last week of February to late March. When American troops started their final invasion of Nazi Germany in February 1945, U.S. Army cameramen were at their side.

programme.title: Embedded 45' - Shooting War in Germany: Embedded 45 - Shooting War in Germany 2
programme.desc: This second episode covers the last week of March to late April. The cameramen covered many stories of victory and defeat, death and liberation. Faces of despair and joy, scenes of war and peace.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Courtney & Isaak
programme.desc: Courtney broke up with Isaak, who she met online. He's doing everything to get her back. Beauty queen Cassidy Wolf joins Nev to get Isaak to leave Courtney alone for good.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Since Leuh saw surfer Justin it's been insta-love. But after two failed attempts to meet up, she wants to know if he's the man of her dreams or is she one in a long line of online lovers. (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Mama doesn't always know best. Shuntay enlists the help of Nev and Max after her mum begins talking about marriage and uprooting her family to be with a man who refuses to meet in person. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: After being Catfished by her best friend, Larissa turned to online pal Anthony for support. Feelings between them grew, but after some suspicious moves, Larissa is worried he is also lying. (S5, ep14)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Hundra & Emily
programme.desc: Hundra never planned on falling in love with a girl and is risking coming out on national TV to learn if her love is for real. Nev investigates to reveal a shocking Catfish. (S4, ep17)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Tyreme met the beautiful Tomorrow online over 9 months ago. Tyreme is ready to uproot his life to be with her. Will Nev and Max be able help Tyreme finally meet his Tomorrow? (S5, ep9)

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 105

programme.desc: Hairdresser Luna must hell his best friend Lola how much he likes her. Carleen is readu to let Jessica know her true feelings.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 215

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 118
programme.desc: Danielle loves to laugh and joke with Chris, but now she wants to get serious with him. Jenni met Christie about a year ago and now she's ready to bare her heart.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 122
programme.desc: Melita must tell Marcus how she feels before he leaves for the military. Gaming nerd Brian, tells Samantha that he's in love with her.

programme.title: Friendzone: Friendzone 202
programme.desc: Cassie is set on telling her best friend Sean she has a crush on him. Nyk is ready to reveal to her best friend Katie how much she likes her.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: A New Direction

programme.title: Hitler's Handmaidens
programme.desc: A look at the women surrounding Hitler once he came to power, and how they were held up as the Aryan Ideal to strive for once the Nazi dictator approved of their positions.

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: The Waffen-SS
programme.desc: The Waffen-SS: Masqueraded as military excellence, the reality was very different. Recruits were poorly trained and remorse was nonexistent, as SS troops killed mercilessly.

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: The SS Death Head's Unit
programme.desc: The SS Death Head's Unit: Tasked with guarding concentration camps, this unit's actions knew no bounds, and, despite their heinous acts, still attended social gatherings.

programme.title: Beyond The Myth: The SS Unveiled: Unrepentant: The SS And Its Myth After 1945
programme.desc: Unrepentant: The SS and Its Myth After 1945: Drawing a line to the present, the atrocities of the SS are beyond all doubt, yet, there is a cult surrounding 'old comrades' today.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: The World At War
programme.desc: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Bomber: Terror of WWII: By Night & By Day
programme.desc: By Night & By Day: The story of a deadly war that intertwines Germany, Poland, Japan, Italy and Spain, and the remorseless development of weapons and bombers.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Weekend Warriors
programme.desc: Tuna.com continues its winning streak, catching two fish in one day while the rest of the fleet struggles to even find a spot to fish in between the weekend recreational boaters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mann gegen Sturm

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s New Best Friend/Freaky Tuesday
programme.desc: D.W. meets 13-year-old Hana, who is much older and totally cool! Is Hana D.W's new BFF? Then, Buster is convinced teachers have it easy. Can he put himself in Mr. Ratburn’s shoes to find out what it’s like to be a teacher?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Baby/D.W.'s Baby
programme.desc: Arthur is not too sure he's ready for a new baby in the house. What do babies do besides cry? Then, living with a baby is no picnic. Just how long will Baby Kate be hanging around, anyway? And who would even miss D.W. if she ran away?

programme.title: Arthur: Falafelosophy/The Great Lint Rush
programme.desc: Sue Ellen tries her hand at writing and illustrating a graphic novel. Then, Mr. Toad is back! And he's ready to corner the Sock Market, leaving everyone in Elwood City barefoot and bereft.

programme.title: Arthur: Buenas Noches, Vicita/Prunella Packs It In
programme.desc: Vicita Molina has lost her favorite bedtime book – can Arthur help her re-create it? Prunella is already starting to think about college! Will she crack under the heavy load or will she learn to relax and do the things she actually enjoys?

programme.title: Arthur: All Thumbs/Kidonia
programme.desc: When Arthur catches Buster sucking his thumb, Buster worries that Arthur will tell the entire school. Tired of doing chores, Arthur and friends decide to invent their own country. Will this kid-ruled utopia flourish or descend into anarchy?

programme.title: Arthur: To Eat or Not to Eat/S.W.E.A.T.
programme.desc: A brand-new candy bar is in town! And what exactly is this ingredient called Tri-Enzomated Zorn Jelly, anyway? Then, it's time for the kids at Lakewood Elementary to take the "S.W.E.A.T” test and anxiety is running high.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Barnes, Art Expert/Arthur's Lucky Pencil
programme.desc: It's a nightmare--Arthur and Buster have to work with Binky. On an art project! I mean, what does a bully like Binky know about art? Then, Arthur discovers the secret to success--a pencil that brings good luck to whoever possesses it.

programme.title: Arthur: Fright Night/Citizen Cheikh
programme.desc: Buster’s Uncle Bob – portrayed by special guest R.L. Stine – comes to visit and tells Buster a spooky bedtime story. Then, Cheikh learns that he and his family will become American citizens!

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen Moves In/The Perfect Brother
programme.desc: A new girl has arrived in town and no one knows anything about her. And judging by the strange things happening at her house no one wants to know. Then, it's great having a friend spend the weekend.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Green Thumb/My Fair Tommy
programme.desc: Buster finds out that his collection of old food makes excellent compost--which makes for even better tomatoes! Then, neither of the Tibble twins has ever won the coveted "Good Behavior of the Week" cupcake award.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Squares, Squares Everywhere
programme.desc: Nick's homework is to find as many squares as he can. It's great fun when Barney and the kids help!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Rabbits - Listen
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective. But all great detectives need a mystery to solve! One quickly comes his way when an animal nibbles on one of Baby Bop's healthy snacks.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play for Exercise!
programme.desc: The children are surprised to learn that playing games and having fun in the park is great exercise. Baby Bop is happy to learn that not only is she exercising while she plays, but exercise will make her grow big and strong.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: On the Road Again
programme.desc: Barney and his friends have a "wheel good fun" day learning about cars. Barney creates a colorful, kid-size car, the dinos learn about seatbelt safety, and everyone discovers there are many different styles of cars.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ sings that he wants to be a rock and roll star. Baby Bop sings that she wants to be a country music star. BJ gets mistaken for the artist who painted a portrait of Barney.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Caring Hearts
programme.desc: A special project provides the perfect opportunity for Barney, Baby Bop and BJ to learn about love and relationships the "heart" way as they make a "Friends and Family Tree."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: BJ's Really Cool House
programme.desc: Although the park may be a home away from home for Barney and his friends, BJ wants to build his own "totally awesome, completely cool" house. While BJ works on his house, Barney and the children learn all about houses and homes.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Baby Bop decide to get Halloween celebrations underway with a costume party. When Ramon loses his trick-or-treat candy, BJ shares his treats with Ramon.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Total Meltdown
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots set up base at an old auto-parts shop. Meanwhile, Megatron's head comes back online and takes control of several robots to attack the Autobots and reclaim the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Blast From The Past
programme.desc: An engineering genius tampers with Bumblebee's system and causes him to become Meltdown. This wouldn't be half bad except for the fact that Meltdown's touch burns holes in the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: The Thrill Of The Hunt
programme.desc: Professor Sumdac's latest creations begin to think for themselves. Eventually, these Dinobots start to hunt down the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Nanosec
programme.desc: Ratchet thinks back on the time that he spent in the Autobot-Decepticon War. Meanwhile, he must face his past when an old Decepticon foe appears, the bounty hunter Lockdown.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Along Came A Spider
programme.desc: Bumblebee faces off against the newest villain, Nanosec.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Sound & Fury
programme.desc: Bumblebee and Bulkhead are having fun celebrating their first-ever Halloween with Sari. That is, until the Decepticon Blackarachnia shows up to ruin their good times.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Lost And Found
programme.desc: Bulkhead realizes that Sari's newest toy is really evil. Unfortunately, none of the Autobots believe him.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Survival Of The Fittest
programme.desc: The Autobots go face to face with two new Decepticons, Lugnut and Blitzwing.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Headmaster
programme.desc: Sari is kidnapped, and the evidence points to the Dinobots. So Prowl and Bulkhead head to a mysterious island to investigate with a highly suspicious Captain Fanzone on their tail.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Nature Calls
programme.desc: One of Sumdac's ex-workers takes control of an Autobot. He then takes the Autobot out on the town.

programme.desc: After moving from city to city to grow their businesses, Terin and Bryan are finally settling down in Vegas. Terin’s mom is graciously hosting them until they find the property of their dreams, but three’s a crowd.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have a grand old time tearing down their Kapla block buildings, which they rebuild just as fast. Grizzy remarks that the she-bear he's in love with is impressed by the Lemmings' construction and makes believe that it's his work of art.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings draw inspiration from lessons they find in a martial arts book and start breaking every wooden object they can get their hands on into two. When Grizzy tries to stop them, they go on to the next lesson and get him in a judo hold.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy dreams that he's a valiant knight who has delivered his beloved. As he is about to take her in his arms, he is woken by the Lemmings who have chosen this day to blast music.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy stands in front of the pantry, desperate. The stock of chocolate spread is completely depleted. He realises that the Lemmings are making some themselves, following a complicated recipe.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Inspired by a magazine with a jewellery ad showing a man offering a diamond to a woman, Grizzy imagines himself offering the ranger's engagement ring to his beloved she-bear.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: When he accidentally sticks a computer microprocessor to his temple, Grizzy is transformed into an exceptionally intelligent being capable of predicting events to come far in advance.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings prepare a dream afternoon snack with the last jar of chocolate spread in the cupboard. Tough luck, Grizzy is coming. Caught off guard, the Lemmings hide the jar in a teddy bear-pyjama case to slip away without arousing suspicion.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy gleefully discovers that he can print images taken with the ranger's camera as it's connected to a state-of-the-art printer. He decides to frame himself, but when the time comes to print his portrait, there's no more paper in the printer.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: A van pulls up to the ranger's cabin to deliver a full crate of jars of chocolate spread. While Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over a wrecking bar to open it, someone steals the crate.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: As usual, Grizzy picks the door of the Ranger's log cabin to come in and make himself comfortable, but this time it's impossible to enter. The Lemmings have requisitioned the cabin for a party and barricaded themselves inside.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have got their hands on some white beans which have very strange properties, when mixed with soda anyone who eats them turns into a bouncing ball. Grizzy realises that if he wants to take a nap, he must get rid of the magic beans.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy wants to get rid of the old piano in the garage at any cost, for the Lemmings love using it to make a dissonant racket. But when he notices a she-bear he's in love with likes the melody of Fur Elise, he decides to learn the piece.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings inherit a crate that fell off a Canadian army convoy transporting ultra-secret material. The case inside the crate emits a sort of laser beam that divides objects into multiple miniaturised versions of themselves.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Near the supermarket, a machine hands out surprise eggs in exchange for a coin. Amongst the lots to be won, there is a super firework rocket the Lemmings dream of.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: At the Ranger's home, Grizzy finds a high-tech gadget that enables you to learn anything within seconds thanks to electrodes hooked to the brain, meaning that he can become the perfect bear.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: An old metal box found by chance in a recess of a cliff brings back childhood memories for Grizzy and the Lemmings.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy struggles to watch a documentary on salmon fish, nice and comfy on the sofa, as the Lemmings play chemistry novices with a fun experiment box.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's TV remote control is stolen by a partridge who collects high-tech objects in his nest perched high up in a tree. This is a case of absolute urgency.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy has got it into his head to offer a butterfly to the bear he's in love with. But the Lemmings fight with him over the rare specimens he's spotted.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have discovered an addictive new game based on the astonishing bouncing properties of the ranger's new running shoes.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy babysits for the she-bear he has a crush on. There's no question of Grizzy tripping up, as he has no intention of taking any risks, but he hasn't reckoned on the Lemmings.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Unwilling to share the food both he and the Lemmings are wild about, Grizzy locks it up inside the ranger's brand new and apparently burglar-proof safe.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is impressed by the TV show of a magician who transforms a partridge into a bouquet of flowers. To get rid of the Lemmings once and for all, for they exasperate him with their incessant games, Grizzy tries the magic trick on them.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's TV remote control is stolen by a partridge who collects high tech objects. This is a case of absolute urgency. Grizzy has no other choice but to requisition the Lemmings' propulsion game to recover his possession.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have discovered a truly wild new game, an augmented reality programme on the ranger's digital tablet. Grizzy confiscates this toy and becomes a fan of the salmon fishing game.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The only edible food item left in the ranger's cabin is a salmon stuck inside a block of ice. Starving, Grizzy decides to melt the ice with the blow dryer. Only the Lemmings are already using it for their latest rocket game in the piping system.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have unearthed a box filled with birthday fountains of light that spit forth giant bursts of sparks. They have a blast, but their new game is not really compatible with a bear's nap.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are playing with their favourite things, they stop to watch an international Christmas insert. Lots of clouds appear in Teletubbyland and begin to snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and sings Po a Nursery Rhyme. The Teletubbies watch some children making lots of different things using gold & silver.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies run around the house before watching some children paint in circles. Tinky Winky and Dipsy make some Tubby Custard, The Noo-noo tidies up all of Dipsy’s Tubby Custard, so Dipsy and Tinky Winky chase the Noo-noo.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa says "Eh-oh" and then runs off to join the others watch some children learn about the number ten. The Teletubbies love to play games.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and the Teletubbies play a round and round game. They watch some children playing stop and go. Then they play a Ready, Steady, Go game round and round Home Hill.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children wearing their boots and playing in the garden. A pair of boots appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Mark go for a ride on his pony Topus. Po goes on a journey; she says goodbye to Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa and sets off on her scooter. Po goes a long, long, long way before it is time for her to go home.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch an traditional Christmas insert featuring children from a school in Scarborough. They are all busy making snowballs. All the snowballs are different sizes.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po and Tinky Winky love to smell flowers. They have great fun running between two groups of flowers smelling them with great big sniffs.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a pavilion in the park to celebrate the annual flower show. Molly has built a special statue of a horse for the occasion which is to be unveiled at the opening ceremony.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles asks Bob to build him a roadside stall where he can sell ‘Pick Your Own’ produce. He has even had a Giant Carrot sign made to go on top of the stall to advertise his wares.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The Mayor decides that the town needs a drive-in cinema and Bob is asked to build it out in the countryside. The first film to be shown will be “The Invasion of the Giant Bug.”

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: A fierce storm is forecast for Bobsville. At the farm Travis stays safe and snug in his shed, while Spud takes cover in a large barn. The storm causes a lot of damage and a tree falls on Spud’s barn – he’s okay, but his nose is a bit squashed!

programme.title: Homes and Playgrounds
programme.desc: Join Bob and his “Can-Do” crew as they go back on site to show you the exciting real world of big machines! From bird’s nests to houses, we all need a home and in this brand new adventure Bob explains how they are built.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: There is great excitement at Bob’s yard when his new metal detector is delivered. He plans to use it to find a burst pipe in Farmer Pickles’ field, and promises Muck that afterwards they will hunt for buried treasure.

programme.title: Green Builds and Recycling Centres
programme.desc: Bob’s back On Site! Join Bob as he shows you the amazing world of eco homes and recycling centres and learn how things you throw away can be used to make something new.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Pam Goody is running out of money to complete the Arts Centre renovations and Molly suggests holding a fashion show to raise funds. Pam thinks this a wonderful idea and asks Molly to organise it. Bob is, of course, just the man to build a catwalk.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and team are building a barn for Farmer Pickles’ sheep, which has to be ready for the lambing season. Farmer Pickles brings the sheep down from the hills and puts them in a pen until the barn is finished.

programme.title: When Bob Became a Builder
programme.desc: It’s a beautiful day in Sunflower Valley and Bob and his machine team are building a new picnic area at the beach. Dizzy, Lofty and Scrambler are clearing stuff that’s been washed up on the beach, while Benny has a great time digging with Scoop and Muck.

programme.title: Built to be Wild

programme.title: Sensing Murder: In Too Deep

programme.title: Sensing Murder

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghosts of the Forgotten
programme.desc: The PRS investigation into the haunted Lake County Poor House becomes a journey through one PRS team members? troubled past.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Devil's Hostage

programme.title: Paranormal State: Permission To Do Harm
programme.desc: When a mirror levitates and shatters on its own, P.R.S. heeds the call to investigate a spirit that has been unleashed on an unsuspecting family. Ryan must track down the spirit and contain it before it does irreparable damage.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghost On the Tracks
programme.desc: PRS is called to a New Jersey beauty salon, but they soon learn that the building's proximity to deadly train tracks might be the true cause of spirit activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Who Is the Lurking Man?
programme.desc: PRS travels to Newcastle, CA to investigate a house with paranormal forces so strong, the family has cleared out. Ryan believes the Native American land may hold the key to the mystery and leads the team in a fight to reclaim a scared family's house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Church of the Damned
programme.desc: Jason and his family can no longer do renovations of an abandoned Kansas church, especially after they found their father in the basement crying and frightened because of the menacing activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Man
programme.desc: A grieving mother suspects her deceased son may have fallen victim to a mysterious entity called The Dark Man.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Black Country Living Museum
programme.desc: The team have a whole village to investigate with results that amazed the all. With a playful spirit communicating through the Ouija board and the EVP machine at the same time the team seem to have their first two-way conversation with the dead.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Lyceum Theatre
programme.desc: The Lyceum Theatre in Crewe is known for its paranormal activity and in this episode the team take the fight right to phantoms that lurk in its darkness with some frightening consequences.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Whittingdon Castle
programme.desc: The ghost of a drowned soldier awaits Yvette and her team of paranormal experts as they tackle the hauntings that plague this once magnificent castle.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Halsham House
programme.desc: Nestled into the British countryside is Halsham house where a poltergeist hides in wait for the team with frightening effect. With bones found in the attic have the team pushed it too far.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Mansion House
programme.desc: Yvette takes her fearless team to a onetime house, onetime museum and now a care home to investigate the strange goings on reported by staff and guests alike. It doesn’t take long for Yvette to regret her decision to go it alone in the cold dark cellar.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Walton Hall
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team visit a gem in the Cheshire countryside where a disembodied voice brings disarray to the investigation and something in the cellar fills Yvette with fear and dread.

programme.title: A Haunting: Eternal Grief
programme.desc: Shortly after moving into her home in Indiana, Jennifer Patterson receives a warning from a stranger that she is not alone in the house. When she hears strange voices, she begins to wonder if the previous owner, who died in the house, still inhabits it.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: Carl, Keith and Cynthia Johnson begin using a spirit board, to communicate with the spirit haunting their home. But when their sister, Cynthia, is attacked both boys realize they are in over their heads and reach out to a paranormal investigator for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: Provoking Evil
programme.desc: Sam Baltrusis’ séance performance leaves him possessed and desperate for safety. A Shaman battles the spirit, so Sam can regain control of his life.

programme.title: A Haunting: Games of Lies
programme.desc: In 2012, Olivia and Jesse Barbour move into their dream home with five-year-old daughter Marie. Soon after, Marie makes her first friend in the neighborhood, a boy named Jackson. Olivia is thrilled until she realizes Jackson is really an imaginary friend.

programme.title: A Haunting: Norman the Doll
programme.desc: Paranormal investigator, Stephen Lancaster, doesn’t believe in haunted objects until he captures proof the doll he recently acquired is haunted. Fearing he is in over his head, he attempts to get rid of it, but the doll has other plans.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends decide to spend the night with Mr Tree under the stars. Fred, however, is terribly afraid of the dark. Despite his inability to sleep, he manages to overcome his fear with the help of his friends.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred is reluctant to go outside and play due to the rain, prompting Gloomy to seek a solution. Despite his best intentions, Gloomy inadvertently creates a mixture of sun, rain and snow.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred and Bubble soar through the sky, astride two butterflies, whilst poor Gloomy is forced to remain on the ground. However, determined to join his friends, Gloomy uses his potion to enlarge a firefly to gigantic proportions.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Gloomy's magic makes butterflies enormous, leading to an unexpected ride. Fred and Bubble fly away on giant butterflies, while Gloomy must make do with a slow-moving, lumbering glowbug.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Maya the Mermaid's musical practice causes problems with her friend Octavius the Octopus. The two get into a disagreement, and Fred and Gloomy must help mend a friendship.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends hear music from the Forgotten Forest and feel glum. They discover its source and realise that they must cheer up the Weeping Willow to stop its sad music from affecting everyone.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: In the forest, a melody so sorrowful resonates, casting melancholy over all who hear it. The source is Willow, a weeping willow abandoned by his group. Gloomy, Fred, Bubble and Maddy offer to play and sing alongside him, lifting his spirits.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The friends clean up their houses for the Midwinter Munchkin on Midwinter's Eve. While the others get ready, Gloomy's messy house may cause the Midwinter Munchkin to skip his visit.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Tulipop and the friends decide to visit Grumpkin. Poor Grumpkin cannot come outside to play. Gloomy and his friends decide to help him spend a day in the sun and thanks to a magic potion they will solve the situation.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred is in the swamp and makes friends with a mud monster. Gloomy, Bubble and Maddy are a little scared of this little creature but soon they realise that he is funny and friendly.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred and Gloomy decide to go to an unexplored territory of Tulipop. Despite their fear of the dark, they encourage each other and discover a beautiful lagoon populated by small lava spirits.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Fred, Maddy, Bubble and Gloomy go on a picnic in the forest to watch the leaves of the trees change colour. But suddenly the leaves turn blue. This is because the forest elf has lost his colour crystal.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: As winter has begun, the little friends decide to go ice skating. Maddy is not doing very well, but her friends are ready to help her so they can all play together.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Tiger Moon falls into the sea, and the whole island must come together to help it find its way home.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Hämy and Jere search for treasure on a new island, but the island is not what it seems.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: The adventures of a colourful group of friends on the magical island of Tulipop.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Grumpkin prepares a Troll Feast, but his friends can't eat troll food as it is full of weird troll ingredients. How do they tell him without hurting his feelings?

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Maddy surprises her friends with an unusual task of looking after a little dragon they know. What appears to be a simple job of putting the dragon to sleep turns out to be far more challenging than any of them had anticipated.

programme.title: Tulipop
programme.desc: Gloomy has concocted a magical potion that creates enormous soap bubbles. She and her friends succeed in getting inside one. However, Bubble loses control and finds herself unable to stop or escape.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: An edge-of-your-seat espionage thriller, starring Richard Gere and Topher Grace as ex-CIA and FBI agents, trying to find the killer of a US senator, which bears the hallmark of an infamous Soviet assassin, thought to be dead.

programme.title: George And The Dragon
programme.desc: A knight (James Purefoy, "Rome") returning from the Crusades takes on a dragon after the disappearance of the kindly Princess Lunna (Piper Perabo, "Coyote Ugly"). With Patrick Swayze.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: A crew of miniature aliens operate a spaceship that has a human form

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Old-school salesmen Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) try to reboot their careers by joining Google’s fiercely competitive internship program — with hilarious results!

programme.title: The Rewrite
programme.desc: A once successful British screenwriter finds himself teaching at a U.S. college where he falls for one of his students who's a single mom.

programme.title: Whip It
programme.desc: In Bodeen, Texas, an indie-rock loving misfit finds a way of dealing with her small-town misery after she discovers a roller derby league in nearby Austin.

programme.title: You Stupid Man
programme.desc: A writer struggles to deal with the break-up with his girlfriend. It does not help with getting her out of his mind that she recently became a famous TV start.

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: A young farmer sets out to recruit mercenaries to defend his peaceful planet, which is under threat of invasion by the evil tyrant Sador and his armada of aggressors. Starring: George Peppard, Robert Vaughn, Richard Thomas

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Romance and suspense ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. Whom can she trust?

programme.title: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: A series of stories following a week in the life of a philandering tabloid journalist living in Rome.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Coffin for a Coward
programme.desc: A Civil War veteran tries to rid his hometown of terrorists.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Shadow of Violence
programme.desc: Suspicious townspeople are drawn toward two brothers who spend their nights digging at a grave.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Melancholy Gun
programme.desc: Johnny Ringo recounts his rise as a gunslinger.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Thar She Blows
programme.desc: An inventor without enough animals to drive his wagon decides to build a sail to do the job.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Measure of a Man
programme.desc: A retiring Arizona ranger chases one last crook.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: A Kingdom for a Horse
programme.desc: The Emperor of Brazil has an encounter with two imaginative youngsters while traveling to San Francisco.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Diamond Field Jack
programme.desc: An attorney takes the case of a famed gunman who is charged with murder.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Deadly Decision
programme.desc: A father who raised a cold-hearted killer worries his younger son may turn out the same way.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Man Who Died Twice
programme.desc: Peaceful Jack Slade changes into a vengeful gunman after he's attacked by a thief.

programme.title: Gold
programme.desc: A ruthless global cabal of financial investors plan to manipulate the price of gold by flooding one of South Africa’s top gold mines. Starring: Roger Moore, Susannah York, Ray Milland, Bradford Dillman, Bernard Horsfall, John Hussey

programme.title: Double Dragon
programme.desc: Evil meets its match in this daring martial arts adventure about two teen brothers out to stop an obsessed tycoon from finding both halves of a mystical talisman.

programme.title: Jack Hunter: And The Star of Heaven
programme.desc: Jack Hunter realizes the pharaoh's tomb being empty except for a Roman coin means the treasure was looted to Rome but later probably transferred the the new, Byzantine capital, Constantinople.

programme.title: Two Came Back
programme.desc: Susan is a seasoned sailor who agrees to help her friends bring a client's 68-foot boat from San Diego to Vancouver. After sailing the boat into a storm with disastrous consequences, the group is challenged to survive. Feat: Melissa Joan Hart.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Lisa's return to her hometown to join the local police force coincides with the release of a man, Jake, who killed her best friend 15 years earlier. Soon, people start dying mysterious deaths and the investigation points to Jake as prime suspect.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: A County Prosecutor's investigation into the apparent suicide of a pregnant woman is ruled a murder leading her to question suspects at a fertility clinic.

programme.title: The Four Warriors
programme.desc: Travelling home, four soldiers discover a village gripped by fear, as residents are abducted by unknown predators. These warriors set out to rescue them and destroy what lurks outside the village.

programme.title: Dark Star
programme.desc: Dark Star is a sci-fi/comedy film directed by John Carpenter and co-written with Dan O'Bannon. The "Beachball with Claws" segment of the film was reworked by Dan O'Bannon into the science fiction-horror film Alien.

programme.title: The Shape of Things to Come
programme.desc: Sometime in the future, man has set up colonies on the Moon, when Earth becomes uninhabitable. A madman decides to destroy the Moon colonies with his robots and automated ships, and only three people and their robot can stop him.

programme.title: StarCrash
programme.desc: An outlaw smuggler and her alien companion are recruited by the Emperor of the Galaxy to rescue his son and destroy a secret weapon by the evil Count Zarth Arn. (1978) Starring: Marjoe Gortner, David Hasselhoff, Caroline Munro, Christopher Plummer.

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Classic story of a little Swiss girl, who after the death of her parents is sent to live with her goat herding grandfather (Max Von Sydow) in the high Alpine mountains.

programme.title: The Adventures of Pinocchio
programme.desc: One of puppet-maker Geppetto's creations, a puppet called Pinocchio, magically comes to life. In order to become a real boy, Pinocchio must go on a daring adventure and learn valuable lessons.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: A raven-haired enchantress, Cassie Nightingale, mysteriously moves into the local haunted mansion, 'Grey House', and seems to change her neighbors lives using a hint of magic causing many to think she’s a witch.

programme.title: The Chaperone

programme.title: Rockets Galore

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Sex & Malice
programme.desc: After Ann Moulds is bombarded with sadistic letters from an anonymous stalker, she tries to get help from police. But with no stalking laws in Scotland, she's at her stalker's mercy.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: After moving to a quiet suburb, "Mary" finds a new best friend in next-door neighbor Jane. But, before long, it's clear that there's something strange about Jane.

programme.title: Andromeda: D Minus Zero
programme.desc: The Andromeda crew is still learning how to work together as they are attacked by the Restorers.

programme.title: Andromeda: Double Helix
programme.desc: The Andromeda gets involved in a feud between a Than planet and a Nietzschean colony.

programme.title: Andromeda: Angel Dark, Demon Bright
programme.desc: A slipstream sends the Andromeda back in time to just before the Commonwealth fell. The crew must intervene to preserve history.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Answering a distress call leads the crew to pick up Beka's brother, now a Wayist, and his friend.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Banks of the Lethe
programme.desc: A black hole allows Dylan to communicate with his former fiancée, 300 years in the past.

programme.title: Andromeda: A Rose in the Ashes
programme.desc: Dylan is imprisoned on a prison planet and must stage an escape as his crew tries to stage their own rescue.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: The Eleventh Hour
programme.desc: As Stevie ties up loose ends on her last day at Drovers Run before trial, she’s saved at the final hour by a desperate confession. Eager to integrate herself into the community to save her marriage, Fiona joins the CFS.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Old Wrongs
programme.desc: Jodi receives ghostly help from the past on Gungellan’s 150th anniversary celebration. Rose arrives to do work experience – but it’s not the joyful reunion that Stevie has imagined.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Handle With Care
programme.desc: Rose falls for a seemingly reformed Leo. Riley reveals the truth of his army days to Jodi on an overnight muster. Regan proposes to Dave with devastating results.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: Leo’s dastardly plan is revealed when Rose runs away with him. Kate’s hopes to win the Young Farmer of the Year Award are dashed when she realises that Jodi is entering too.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: One Perfect Day
programme.desc: Riley steals Phil Rakich’s prize bull in a flawed attempt to impress Jodi.

programme.title: McLeod's Daughters: Winners and Losers
programme.desc: When Alex returns from the city with Fiona, Stevie fears he's changed his mind about leaving his wife but Alex explains they had no time alone whilst away.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 1
programme.desc: While on honeymoon in London, Alice discovers that Danny has some final business to do before they can return home to Africa. He's reluctantly arranged to meet his estranged father, Robert, who has recently got back in touch.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 2
programme.desc: Danny is throwing himself into his work after the death of his father, and has applied for the role of State Vet. However, Danny's attempts to involve Thabo in the first phase of the Lion Breeding Project lead to Du Plessis feeling like an outsider.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 3
programme.desc: It is Danny's first day as State Vet and when he helps rescue some smuggled animals he feels he's making a difference. However, he discovers the role isn't going to be all plain sailing.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Danny's first big project as State Vet is a major animal translocation, and he is desperate to impress. Meanwhile, whilst Alice is out in the bush treating an injured zebra, she is stalked by lions. She makes it back to her jeep in time but is shaken up.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Alice is still suffering from a loss of nerve after her close shave with the lions and so Danny tries to help her overcome her problems – the Leopard's Den lions have produced their first cub and he needs Alice back in the saddle.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Hail of Bullets
programme.desc: The murder of a young father stuns his close-knit community, but the investigation reveals a neighborly dispute turned deadly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Snitch
programme.desc: When officers respond to a shooting , they discover the body of a young man they know all to well -- police informant Jimmie Stevenson. it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine who pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Metal on Metal
programme.desc: A athlete is gunned down just weeks before starting college, leaving family heartbroken and detectives stumped. The man seems an unlikely target, until Lt. Joe Kenda pries into his personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Rains Down
programme.desc: Restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. Kenda must break through a web of lies to hunt down one of the most dangerous criminal masterminds he’s ever faced.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. Violence
programme.desc: 29yr old Chris is shot in cold blood outside a neighborhood bar. Faced with a trio of suspects, Kenda trusts his gut and makes a controversial decision.
