programme.title: On the Case: Evil Repeats Itself
programme.desc: Beautiful teenager Mary Jayne Jones is found murdered in a desolate farmhouse while its owner is out of town.

programme.title: On the Case: One of Us
programme.desc: A young records clerk at the Seattle police department is murdered on her way to work her overnight shift. Can police find the evidence to catch the killer of one of their own?

programme.title: On the Case: Snapshot to Murder
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes into thin air during a day studying in the park. Will a photograph from a nearby celebration help solve the case?

programme.title: On the Case: Heartbreak in the Heartland
programme.desc: A quiet Midwestern community is rocked by a gruesome triple homicide. The unspeakable tragedy robs one man of his mother, grandmother and 5 year old son.

programme.title: On the Case: Half Way Home
programme.desc: The discovery of a woman's body inside an abandoned trailer leads to a 28-year search for the person responsible for her beating death.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: After landing on a world ravaged by earthquakes, Wade (Sabrina Lloyd) falls into a crevice and discovers a deserted city below the surface.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders (Jerry O'Connell, Sabrina Lloyd, Cleavant Derricks, Kari Wuhrer) encounter an old friend while sheltered on a world covered with a suffocating fog.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: Quinn and Rembrandt (Jerry O'Connell, Cleavant Derricks) get snared in a rare South American snake deal and wind up getting Maggie and Wade (Kari Wuhrer, Sabrina Lloyd) trapped during a rescue attempt.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders (Jerry O'Connell, Sabrina Lloyd, Cleavant Derricks, Kari Wuhrer) return to the world where they lost Arturo, only to find the land terrorized by dinosaurs; Col. Rickman feeds off the settlers' DNA.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The lead singer of a rock band encourages Wade (Sabrina Lloyd) to join until Quinn (Jerry O'Connell) discovers the band members are vampires seeking to snatch the Sliders' timer. With Cleavant Derricks and Kari Wuhrer.

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders (Jerry O'Connell, Sabrina Lloyd, Cleavant Derricks, Kari Wuhrer) land on a world where animal and human DNA have been fused by an evil scientist (Michael York), creating a civilization of carnivorous creatures.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Jeremy Bamber
programme.desc: An investigation into Jeremy Bamber's brutal murder of his family in Essex, which occurred in 1985. Sentenced for life, he still maintains he is innocent. Is the right person behind bars?

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Suzy Lamplugh
programme.desc: A look at the case of estate agent Suzy Lamplugh, who showed a client around a house in Fulham in July 1986 and was never seen again. Dermot Murnaghan hosts.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Wrongly Released
programme.desc: This special episode shines a light on criminals who have been brought to justice for one crime only to be released to commit further terrible acts.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The London Nail Bombings
programme.desc: London was brought to a standstill in April 1999 when 23-year-old political extremist David Copeland caused terror with a bombing campaign.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Into Thin Air: David Gilroy
programme.desc: It was a missing person’s case that shook the people of Scotland to their core. Within a week of Suzanne Pilley disappearing from her place of work in Edinburgh, police were convinced they were hunting for a killer - despite not having found a body.

programme.title: Moesha: Mom
programme.desc: Dorian finds his mom, but it’s Moesha who ends up getting hurt.

programme.title: Moesha: That's My Moma
programme.desc: Dorian thought finding his mom would provide answers, not raise more questions (Lil Bow Wow guest stars).

programme.title: Moesha: What If...
programme.desc: Niecy spins a fantasy about what Moesha’s life would be like if her mom raised her instead of Frank.

programme.title: Moesha: Scary Marriage
programme.desc: Moesha and her friends are matched up in a mock marriage for a homework assignment.

programme.title: Moesha: Saving Private Rita
programme.desc: Moesha saves a suicidal friend, while Dorian pretends to be religious to impress a cute girl.

programme.title: Moesha: Mayhem At The Jam
programme.desc: A concert gets out of Moesha’s control and Hakeem takes a beating.

programme.title: Moesha: Creepin’
programme.desc: Moesha and Hakeem’s relationship heats up, while Dorian dates an older woman.

programme.title: Moesha: Graduation Day
programme.desc: Dorian’s new older girlfriend is enticing him with promises of a record deal, while Mo and Hakeem fight about trust.

programme.title: Moesha: Paying The Piper
programme.desc: Hakeem asks Moesha to move in with him, and Dorian’s past comes back to haunt him.

programme.title: Moesha: Pilot
programme.desc: Moesha clashes with her new stepmother. When she ignores Dee’s grounding and goes to the local hangout, the Den, her heart is broken when she finds Ohagi, the boy she likes, with another girl.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell hatches a plan to win over Nicki. Stuart and Phil visit Stuart's old home one last time before it is sold.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil unknowingly sleeps with a nun and must keep Nicki from finding out. Haskell and Eden take care of a fussy Holly after she suffers an injury.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly accidentally sets Haskell up with a gay man. Stuart helps Phil get over his fear of funerals.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart asks Nicki to accompany him to an important dinner. Phil and Haskell consider getting vasectomies together.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly dates an older man only to find he lives in an assisted living facility. Nicki comes to Phil with a proposition.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: In the wake of Haskell declaring his love for Nicki, Holly tries to play cupid. Stuart secretly arranges for Phil to get together with his high school crush.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly represents Nicki in her divorce, but lets her own history with marriage get in the way. Phil tries to prove he’s not getting older by dating a much younger woman.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly joins a grief support group to meet a man. Stuart and Haskell help prepare Phil for a talk show appearance after he develops a lisp.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell dates a beautiful woman who Phil is convinced is really a man. Stuart is filled with guilt after he sleeps with a woman who thinks he’s a war hero.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell’s estranged brother shows up and asks for one small favor: his kidney. Holly mentors a teenager who turns out to like Eden’s job more than hers.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly throws a birthday party for Stuart and Nicki, but her real motive is to impress a guy she's just met who's new in town. Nicki and Stuart's dad shows up and ruins everything.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Betrayed
programme.desc: 19 year old Greg Parsons is convicted of brutally murdering his mother mainly on evidence of the audio tape of a song he'd written, "Kill your Parents".

programme.title: 72 Hours: Vanished
programme.desc: A small town public school teacher fails to arrive for work for the first time in thirty years, leaving an empty house and a baffled community.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Angel of Death
programme.desc: An angel of mercy turns out to be an angel of death when the number of deaths in an Indiana Intensive Care Unit skyrockets. One astute nurse believes there must be more to this than just natural causes.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Ghost
programme.desc: A cunning arsonist stays one step ahead of the police and terrifies a small farming community until behavioural profiling help detectives zero in on a very unlikely suspect.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Good Doctor
programme.desc: A single mother in Saskatchewan visits a hospital in the midst of a panic attack. Her doctor sedates her. Then, she is certain, he rapes her.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Secret Life
programme.desc: In Calgary, Alberta, a beautiful Ethiopian woman is found brutally strangled. The victim’s husband seems genuinely distraught over his wife’s death, but there is something strangely suspicious about him.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hijacked
programme.desc: In 1971, before the era of airport security, a Black Panther hijacks a plane to Havana, Cuba. A thirty-year old cold case is finally solved in 2002 by a fluke of modern technology.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Dead End
programme.desc: A young couple hits the road, hitchhiking across North America. Free spirits keen to explore the world. When the young woman stops phoning home, her father is alarmed.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Double Cross
programme.desc: The investigation of the murder of a shady Montreal businessman takes detectives into the lurid underworld of drug dealers, con men, and crooked lawyers.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)
programme.desc: Marc Van Beers, a 36-year old Brussels tax lawyer, dies in a road accident while on honeymoon. His wife Aurore is unharmed by the accident.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road to interview a list of inmates at Millburn Penitentiary.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: In the midst of a chaotic day at the station, Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: Chris’s addiction issues come to a head when an innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a suspicious home invasion investigation

programme.title: Rookie Blue: "Moving Day"
programme.desc: 15 Division is assigned to a community outreach program, “Moving Day”, to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet. But personal feelings get thrust aside when a bomb explodes in a downtown parking garage

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division work to track down TED MCDONALD (the car-bomber from Ep. 510). But even after catching him, they realize Ted has more targets set to explode out there. The clock is ticking

programme.title: Relic Hunter: French Connection
programme.desc: While on a lecture tour with Nigel in Europe, Sydney is contacted by MI5 because she is the only one who can prevent an impending high-level assassination.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Midnight Flight
programme.desc: Germania, ca. 400 AD: an artifact called Gunther's Scepter is sealed in a vault. Kleine Burgh, 2001: Sydney and Nigel are hired to find it using a crystal and a stone tablet.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Executioner's Mask
programme.desc: When a model's face is disfigured after she puts on the mask of a French executioner, Sydney and Nigel will try and find the tomb to reverse the curse.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Royal Ring
programme.desc: When the British Museum gets Sidney and Nigel to help search at Tudor sites for a ring of King Henry VIII, Nigel is confronted with his self-confident pestering elder brother Preston Bailey.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Set in Stone
programme.desc: In a monastery, Knight Gabriel impales a demon, which then turns to stone. In 2001, Nigel and Sydney arrive bearing a letter from a monk, but the abbot claims it is a forgery and shuts them out.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: New. James Acaster has asked Zuu to cook for him while he records his hit podcast Off Menu. Zuu prepares a dessert that has them both fearing they may have bitten off more than they can chew.Contains Strong Language.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu, Tubsey and Hyder travel to an exclusive golf course on the south coast, where they have been asked to cook up a feast for former football manager, and king of the jungle, Harry Redknapp.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Judi Love has asked Zuu to prepare her a slap-up meal for after her appearance on `Loose Women'. Judi is the queen of seafood, so Zuu digs deep to bring her the ultimate seafood boil, complete with a whole lobster, scallops and crab butter.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Grime artist and self-taught chef Big Zuu travels to Croydon with his food truck and sidekicks Hyder and Tubsey to cook a meal that will impress Jimmy Carr just after he steps off stage.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu heads to Portsmouth to cook a meal for comedian Rosie Jones. Rosie is on tour and is desperate for some quality fish and chips. In an attempt to meet her expectations, Zuu goes out for a spot of fishing.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu goes regal as he visits Royal Leamington Spa to prepare a feast for actor and comedian Guz Khan. In order to impress Guz, Zuu sets out to prepare both meat-based and plant-based dishes.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu is back home in London as he prepares to cook for comedian Phil Wang whilst he tours with his show. Eager to impress, Zuu's mum is enlisted to help make the perfect jollof rice.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu and the boys are back on the road heading to Cardiff to cook for American stand-up and actor Desiree Burch. She's in the Welsh capital with her new show, 'Desiree's Coming Early'.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu heads off to Hackney in East London in order to prepare a three-course meal for comedian Jamali Maddix. Along the way, he dives deep into the local delicacy that is jellied eels.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu and the boys are going international flying all the way to the Isle of Man to cook for comedian, Josh Widdicombe, who on his Bit Much tour. However, first they will need to source a new food truck on the island.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Big Zuu heads to Soho to see if he can meet the culinary expectations of comedian London Hughes. To make his task even more interesting, London makes a £1,000 wager that he won't be able to impress her.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Handyman
programme.desc: Mr. Kim fixes a toilet for Kimchee. Janet believes there is more to Edwin and Mrs. Kim's relationship.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appa's Lump
programme.desc: Mr. Kim's friend discovers a lump on Appa's back and he is reluctant to tell his family. Janet needs to attend an important ceremony, but the store has not been closed for twenty years.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Family Singing Contest
programme.desc: Mrs. Kim wants the family to sing at their church festival but really wants her son to sing with her instead of her daughter, whose voice in the past had left much to be desired.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Janet's Roommate
programme.desc: Jung worries his time to ask Shannon to go on a date is running out. Janet and Gerald are forced to put their apartment plans on hold.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Business Award
programme.desc: With a local business award up for grabs, Appa is feeling a little jumpy. Jung tries to get Shannon into cycling.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: House Guest
programme.desc: Umma invites Pastor Nina to move in while her apartment is renovated. Jung crashes Janet and Gerald's trivia night.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Cardboard Jung
programme.desc: When Nayoung visits, a white lie leads to romantic chaos. Meanwhile, Umma brings a life-size cardboard cutout of Jung to the store.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Date Night
programme.desc: Janet urges her dad to step up his romance game during a date night with Umma. Jung stains Kimchee's collector sneakers and hunts to replace them.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Resting Place
programme.desc: While visiting their future burial plots, Appa and Umma make an unfortunate discovery. A faux fight between Jung and Kimchee is caught on video.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Sneak Attack
programme.desc: Appa and Umma learn that selling illegal face cream has a downside. Janet adopts an alternate identity to get into a film festival.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Silent Auction
programme.desc: In hopes of claiming a winning lotto ticket, Janet searches for a legal loophole. Jung has a tough talk with Shannon. Umma covets a fancy coat.

programme.title: JAG: Full Engagement
programme.desc: While on their day off, Harm takes Mac for a flight in his vintage airplane, only to be forced to make an emergency landing in a mountain clearing because of mechanical problems.

programme.title: JAG: Cowboys and Cossaks
programme.desc: Harm, Mac, and Bud are assigned sea duty to monitor a joint war games exercise between U.S. and Russian naval forces.

programme.title: JAG: The Guardian
programme.desc: Harm and Mac defend Bauwer, a former Navy Seal, now a homeless man, who's accused of using excessive force when he killed three men who tried to hold up a convenience store.

programme.title: JAG: Rendevous
programme.desc: Mac and Harm once again find themselves courtroom adversaries as Mac is assigned the difficult task of defending CPO Holst, an admitted wife abuser accused of murdering his wife's boyfriend.

programme.title: JAG: Ghost Ship
programme.desc: Harm and Mac investigate the discovery of a skeleton found hidden aboard a decommissioned aircraft carrier that is being cut up for scrap, and learn it is all that remains of a long-missing JAG officer.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Free Kimmy
programme.desc: (S04E011) Alison and Hayley honeymoon at a luxurious hotel/resort in Cancun, which he owns. Jack's father orders his other son, Bobby, to "take care of" Amanda.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Kimberly Does L. A.
programme.desc: (S04E012) Kimberly's bed-hopping puts her life in danger when her latest conquest turns out to be Vic, a psychotic man who has made threatening calls to her radio show.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Hook, Line and Hayley
programme.desc: (S04E013) Kimberly tells Peter that she is giving up her radio career to become a psychiatrist. Amanda suspects that Bobby is going to kill her, but he says he came to Los Angeles to protect her from his family.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Two Flew Over The Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: (S04E014) Brooke blames Alison for Hayley's death and arranges for Alison to be taken in for questioning. Jake turns to a loan shark friend to cope with Shooters' crisis.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Oy to the World
programme.desc: S04E015) Brooke learns that she is not really pregnant, but doesn't share the truth with Billy. When Jane monopolizes Michael's time, Sydney slips tranquilizers into her drink.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Holy Strokes
programme.desc: (S04E016)Jane has suffered a stroke and is left paralyzed on one side. Brooke asks Billy to meet her at the hospital and says that she has suffered a miscarriage.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Nobody Nose * Libby Like Sabrina Knows * Libby
programme.desc: An out-of-control magic spaceship lands Sabrina and Salem inside Libby’s brain.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Christmas Amnesia
programme.desc: It’s beginning to look a lot like Christmas until Sabrina accidentally erases the holiday

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina and The Beast
programme.desc: In order to teach Sabrina a lesson about love and beauty, Harvey is turned into a beast.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Whose So-Called Life is it Anyway?
programme.desc: Sabrina’s charitable magic turns out to be anything but a good deed.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Matchmaker
programme.desc: It’s Valentine’s Day, and Sabrina must help two people fall in love or suffer Cupid’s wrath.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: What Price Harvey?
programme.desc: Magical ambition shows its dark side when Harvey drops out of school to become an industrial tycoon.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina And The Pirates
programme.desc: Purchasing a fake ID in the Other Realm causes Sabrina’s magic to become fake as well.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Mrs. Kraft

programme.desc: Legend has it that in the Amazon jungle lies El Dorado, a mythical city of gold. Colonel Percy Fawcett, believed in its existence and spent years searching. In 1925, he vanished with his son and a friend during an expedition revealing a civilization.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1944 Italy, SS soldiers raid an Italian Count's villa under Himmler's orders to find the Germania, an ancient manuscript by Tacitus. Himmler idealized it as the "Book of Power" to prove Aryan superiority, justifying Nazi atrocities.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Ron Wyatt, a Nashville nurse turned amateur archaeologist at 47, aimed to validate Bible stories. In 1977, he claimed finding Noah’s Ark on Mount Ararat and later dived for Egyptian chariot remains, supporting Moses’ Red Sea crossing.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto
programme.desc: From a medieval hand-grenade to an extremely rare dinosaur, discover the secrets inside the Royal Ontario Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Natural History Museum, London
programme.desc: From Darwin’s original specimens to a lost workshop that inspired James Bond, discover the secrets of Britain’s Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Vatican
programme.desc: From Michelangelo’s Sistine Chapel frescoes to the fall of the Knights Templar, discover the secrets inside the Vatican Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Tornadoes
programme.desc: George embarks on his annual pilgrimage to the "Tornado Alley" area of the central U.S. to guide groups of people who want to witness the brute force of tornadoes in action

programme.title: Angry Planet: Midwest Stormfest
programme.desc: This season the tornadoes begin early - in February. Through the season, George follows the big weather from Missouri west to the Dakotas, and dodges the huge, destructive Greensburg tornado in southern Kansas.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane Triple Threat
programme.desc: George chases deadly hurricanes in the USA: Gustav in Louisiana and Hanna in North Carolina. He then flies with USAF Hurricane Hunters into Ike over Cuba, meeting it again as it makes a wild destructive landfall in Galveston, Texas.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hawaii: Surf & Snow
programme.desc: In Hawaii George explores the wild side: diving with Galapagos sharks, ascending to snow-covered Mauna Kea, dental cleaning by Peppermint Cleaner Shrimp, extreme surfing at Banzai Pipeline, getting his boots lit on fire by Kilauea volcano.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Arctic Winter
programme.desc: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore frigid Canadian Arctic winter. The team uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head North through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Island Caving
programme.desc: Accompanied by a group of hardcore cavers from Alberta and British Columbia, George descends into spectacular caves that lead deep into the earth on Vancouver Island. The team carries inflatable kayaks to explore a dark underground river.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Crystal Cave
programme.desc: In 2000 in Chihuahua, Mexico, miners found a cave filled with giant crystals. Temperatures reach 120 degrees F and humidity nearly 100%. George leads an Explorers Club Flag Expedition into this extreme environment.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Highway to Hail
programme.desc: George and his team head into "bears' cage", looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones in Texas and Oklahoma. Their storm chasing vehicles don't look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Winds Of Autumn
programme.desc: This year he starts off by getting prepared in a wind tunnel, then he and his chase partner Mark Robinson head to Newfoundland for more wild weather action. Then, it's off to another encounter where the wild wind fans a raging inferno.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Java: Land of Fire
programme.desc: In the Pacific Ring of Fire island of Java, George explores new ash eruptions from Anak Krakatau, whose 1883 eruption shook the world. He travels to Merapi and descends into Kawah Ijen to explore the world's largest lake of sulfuric acid.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it's also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient sky watchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Earthrise: The First Lunar Voyage
programme.desc: Interviews with Apollo 8 astronauts, their wives, mission control staff, and journalists give true insider's perspective to the space race of the late 1960's.

programme.title: How to Colonize the Stars
programme.desc: Leading physicists and engineers in the field of interstellar travel discuss some of the deep issues we face when considering the problem of sending spacecraft to other stars. Will mankind ever truly become a space fairing civilization?

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Ever Expanding Universe
programme.desc: The Ever-Expanding Universe investigates a battery of high-tech telescopes that are joining the Hubble Space Telescope on its quest to unlock the secrets of our universe, a cosmos almost incomprehensible in its size, age and violence.

programme.title: Hitler's People: Conformity
programme.desc: Nazi Germany 10 years before the 1944 assassination attempt: it’s the era just after the seizure of power, when enforced conformity becomes part of all aspects of life.

programme.title: Hitler's People: Total War
programme.desc: By the time of the Allied landings in Normandy, everything has changed: it marks the beginning of the end for Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Hostages of the SS: A Journey into the Unknown
programme.desc: The SS clandestinely transports their valuable hostages through the Alps.

programme.title: Hostages of the SS: On a Razor's Edge
programme.desc: In Niederdorf the hostages turn the tables on their kidnappers.

programme.title: Karelia - Russia's Primeval Forests
programme.desc: Journey into a unique wilderness in Russia’s north: Karelia.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Islands can be home to the most extreme examples of life, the wildest of people and the most dramatic landscapes. Natural selection fuels evolution in the most dramatic way

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Thailand – The Wild Heart
programme.desc: Thailand is a land of extremes. A country shaped by wild forces, where animals face tough challenges to survive. Yet they have evolved into some of the most iconic and successful species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia
programme.desc: The island chain of Indonesia is home to more active volcanoes than any other country in the world. Yet somehow, instead of posing a threat – this volcanic activity is a source of life

programme.title: Wildest Middle East
programme.desc: Wildest Middle East reveals the remotest and most surprising corners of this ancient land, where you will find nothing is as it seems and where the natural world is fighting a constant battle to survive in an ever changing world.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Australia
programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Master metal man Ian Roussel is back at it, as one of his most eccentric clients throws down the challenge on a lead sled transformation

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Master metal man Ian Roussel continues the Lead Sled Challened

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Master metal man Ian Roussel does the unthinkable with his wild show car

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Master metal man Ian Roussel continues the journey with his wild show car

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Master metal man Ian Roussel attempts to complete his wild show car

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: An inside look at Full Custom Garage.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Guns & Ice
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Smackdown of Baby Lyssa
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Your Lying Eyes
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit on this case takes them into some parts of Ohau, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Crime Don't Pay
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble - or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Twisted Love
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado and they face a special challenge - getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: No Luv Still
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Can't Hardly Weight

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Shot Thru The Heart

programme.desc: When the warehouse guys new office pet (a lizard) escapes, they try all they can in order to catch the wily reptile. Proving impossible, the guys finally decide to bring in the big guns to help trap it--Mr. Phil Robertson.

programme.desc: Lizzy MacGill is a horse trainer's young daughter who elopes with Garth Armstrong, a privileged man.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: This episode investigates the claim that there is an alien presence already on Earth.

programme.desc: Caress continues to extort Emily Fallmont; Clay, suffering from guilt, proposes marriage to Sammy Jo, Las Vega style; Michael is forced to tell Amanda the truth; Emily tells Buck of her past with Ben and fleeing from his rage.

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen Gets Her Goose Cooked/Best of The Nest

programme.title: Arthur: Postcards from Buster, Parts I & II
programme.desc: Buster's going to New York City to meet his dad Bo, and the Reads are coming with him! He's thrilled ... but won't his mom miss him? But, Bitzi gives him a present that will let him share his exciting trip with her--a video camera!

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Eyes/Francine's Bad Hair Day
programme.desc: For some reason, Arthur isn't doing very well in school anymore. Maybe he just needs some glasses? Problem is, Arthur hates having to wear them. And it's school picture day and Muffy is determined that Francine will look her best.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Stray Netkitin/Bats in the Belfry
programme.desc: D.W. is panicked when a virus ruins the Read family computer. Who will take care of her virtual pet? Arthur and D.W. are thrilled when Grandma Thora lets them turn her attic into a clubhouse. But will a bat threaten their new play space?

programme.title: Arthur: Grandma Thora Appreciation Day/Fern's Slumber Party
programme.desc: Arthur and D.W. are planning a surprise party for Grandma Thora. But amidst the party-planning mayhem, they forget about the guest of honor! Then, shy Fern hosts a slumber party at her mother's urging.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Loses His Marbles/Friday The 13th
programme.desc: When Arthur discovers that Grandma Thora is a marbles champion, he trains with her so he can beat all his friends. Then, Brain doesn't believe in superstitions, so when he has a string of bad luck, he's stunned.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Read: Super Saver!/Tibbles to the Rescue!
programme.desc: Business is slow for Mr. and Mrs. Read, and Arthur is concerned. Can he find ways to keep his family in the green? When D.W. saves Tommy and Timmy from a nasty fall, they decide to repay the favor…whether D.W. likes it or not.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Little Red Rock'n Hood - Differences
programme.desc: Baby Bop is having a hard time finding a story she hasn't heard before. Barney and the little dinos decide to tell her an old story with a new twist! They tell the story of "Little Red Riding Hood" in a whole new way...by singing it!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Parade of Bikes
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: All About Me
programme.desc: Baby Bop and BJ have fun playing ball in the park. Barney helps them learn that trying something new can also be fun. Baby Bop prepares a special picnic for BJ, but much to his surprise, it consists mostly of her favorite foods.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Splish! Splash!
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ, Baby Bop and Riff can hardly wait for the petting zoo that is coming to the park. Riff feels terrible when he accidentally wrecks BJ’s beloved scooter.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Everybody's Got Feelings
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and BJ learn that everyone has feelings—happy, sad, angry—and sometimes all those feelings can be experienced in just one day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play Piano With Me!
programme.desc: The children learn all about the piano when they play games, listen to real pianos and even play a little themselves.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop can't find anybody to play with her. When the others see her feeling sad, they decide to play whatever she wants to play. The dinos and kids are planning a camp-out at the park.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Nature Calls
programme.desc: One of Sumdac's ex-workers takes control of an Autobot. He then takes the Autobot out on the town.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Megatron Rising, Part 1
programme.desc: Prowl, Bumblebee and Sari head into the forest to find the source of mysterious Cybertronian energy readings.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Megatron Rising, Part 2
programme.desc: When Starscream, Lugnut and Blitzwing begin their invasion of Earth, Optimus Prime demands Sari hand over her key for safekeeping. This causes her to run away, only to end up in the clutches of Blackarachnia.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: The Elite Guard
programme.desc: Now that Megatron's body is rebuilt, he leads the Decepticons in his search for the AllSpark. When the Autobots fail to defend the Earth from the Decepticons, they must fight harder than ever to protect the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: The Return Of The Headmaster
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and his band of Autobots are taken off the job when the Cybertron Elite Guard, led by Ultra Magnus, comes to Earth looking for the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Mission Accomplished
programme.desc: Optimus teams up with Sentinel Prime in order to defeat the Headmaster.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Garbage In, Garbage Out
programme.desc: Unaware of the Decepticon activity, the Elite Guard take Optimus Prime and the Autobots back to Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Velocity
programme.desc: The AllSpark creates a new Autobot out of pieces of garbage.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: Rise Of The Constructicons
programme.desc: Bumblebee competes against the Decepticons in an underground racing competition.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: A Fistful Of Energon
programme.desc: When the AllSpark turns construction vehicles into Autobots, Bulkhead becomes fast friends. However, the Decepticons have other plans in mind.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated: S.U.V.: Society Of Ultimate Villainy
programme.desc: Prowl goes after Starscream when he escapes from the custody of the Elite Guard. However, he receives competition from Lockdown when Megatron offers a bounty on Starscream.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Kieron & Emma

programme.title: Property Brothers: Stefan & Owen

programme.title: Property Brothers: Matt & Aleya

programme.title: Property Brothers: Stephen & Julie

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have unearthed a box filled with birthday fountains of light that spit forth giant bursts of sparks. They have a blast, but their new game is not really compatible with a bear's nap.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's last jar of chocolate spread has been pinched by the Lemmings, who are savouring it in secret.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Wedged in his sofa to relieve his aching back, Grizzy baulks at getting up. He designs clever strategies to do everything from a distance, including confiscating the Lemming's radio-controlled toy robot transformer, which he will use as a butler.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The vibrations created by Grizzy's snoring during his nap give the Lemmings an idea for a bouncing game. But when Grizzy changes positions and his snoring stops, the Lemmings must find other sources of vibrations.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a birthday piñata in the ranger's living room. The idea of bursting open a papier-mache statue with a bat as it says in the instructions pleases him.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Inside a mysterious cave, Grizzy and the Lemmings discover a magical Game of the Goose. The events displayed in the squares that the players land on come true in real life.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is bothered by an object stuck in between the sofa cushions. It's a big fur lemming puppet glove and the Lemmings believe that the puppet is a Super Lemming who's stronger than Grizzy and start to obey it.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers the leftovers of a Halloween party in the ranger's cabin, which was entirely redecorated for the occasion.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: When the last jar of chocolate spread they were fighting over sinks to the bottom of the river, Grizzy and the Lemmings have no choice but to dive in to recover it. But to their great surprise, they discover you can't breathe in water.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a strange figurine with the power to switch the spirits of two living beings and finds himself imprisoned in the body of a caribou.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: While salmon fishing on the riverbank, Grizzy hauls in an unusual catch: an old hand mirror straight out of a fairytale; instead of showing the reflection of the person who holds it, the mirror shows an idealized vision of his surroundings.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: In a casing that fell from a circus caravan, the Lemmings find a magic stick that can enchant objects and make them come alive.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy calls upon his fishing instincts to seduce the she-bear, but only succeeds in making a fool of himself. When he sees the Lemmings riding a magnificent wild salmon like rodeo cowboys, he tries to steal theirs.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Kipo and the gang look for answers in her parents' former quarters; mysterious forces gather.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: The chums frolic with Fun Gus until a slippery helper arrives. It is time to throw Kipo an anchor as the Mega Monkey moves on.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: The Mega Jaguar rages out of control in fury, but Benson knows how to deal with the rowdy Mutes. The question concerns whether or not the gang can trust Doctor Emilia and Kipo, himself.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: A tyrant tells his tale; Wolf, Benson and Dave hatch a plan that could blow up in their faces.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: The day of the big coronation has finally arrived. Kipo and team have come to learn that the enemy they thought they were fighting is only half as bad as the real enemy, Dr Emilia.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some two children look for fox cubs. Tinky Winky falls asleep in bed, Dipsy falls asleep at the table, Laa-Laa falls asleep on the slide and Po falls asleep on the scooter.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little girl visit her cousin to stay the night. The Teletubbies are very busy with their favourite things.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children crawling. In Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies are crawling. Tinky Winky crawled along the path, Dipsy crawled over the hill, Laa-Laa crawled between the trees and Po crawled around the flowers.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa and Dipsy hug and run off to watch some children making some fancy dress clothes. A crown appears in Teletubbyland and when Tinky Winky wears the crown he becomes King Tinky Winky.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message for Dipsy and Laa-Laa. The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number two.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky counts to five. The Teletubbies watch some children feeding lambs. Dipsy makes up a magic tune and wakes up the other Teletubbies.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little girl draw a picture on a paving slab using chalks. A cloud appears in Teletubbyland and rains and rains and makes a big beautiful rainbow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some children learn about the number four, and the Teletubbies decide to go into the house. One by one, they leave. So, who is in the house?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po wants some Tubby Custard, but she doesn' t have time to eat is before watching some children do some painting in the garden. The Tubbies are very careful not to spill their Tubby Custard, but if they do, the Noo Noo will tidy up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies pop up and run off to watch some children tell a story with their drawings. Laa-Laa goes for a walk and as she walks she sings a song about what she sees.

programme.title: Built to be Wild
programme.desc: Yeeee-haaw! Its hoedowns and showdowns for Bob the Builder and his machine team as they hit the trail to the Wild West for their fourth feature length adventure - BUILT TO BE WILD!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has volunteered to look after the farm whilst Farmer Pickles takes Humpty to a pig show. Bob arrives with Lofty at the crack of dawn whilst Wendy is due later to repair the roof on the barn.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are taking a break from building so they can tidy-up all the left over materials from around the Valley. Farmer Pickles asks Bob if he’ll put together Scruffty’s new kennel. Bob’s got a busy morning but agrees to build the kennel later on.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop and the machines are in Sunflower Valley setting up Wendy’s caravan. Scoop contacts Muck to find out where Bob has got to. Muck explains that they haven’t left Bobsville yet because they’ve lost Bob’s Dad!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Bentley is organising a winter fair in the town hall square and enlists Bob to help set up the stalls, lights and the centrepiece of the fair – a giant inflatable Santa Claus.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob’s built a new waterwheel for the old watermill. He’s made it at the yard, but now needs to dismantle it to take it to the mill in sections. Bob needs Benny, Scoop, Lofty and Muck to carry the wheel sections through the marshland to the mill.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is putting up some new signs in Sunflower Valley to help people find their way round the valley. Meanwhile Dizzy has been asked by Ela Stevenson if she’ll be the ‘walking bus’ and help the children get to school.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The whole town is practicing for an egg and spoon race, which Mrs Percival has organised. Trix decides to enter, but unfortunately she practices with fresh eggs and in her usual haste she manages to make a great mess in JJ’s yard.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles wants a fence built around his compost heap, as Scruffty keeps getting into it. Muck is excited at the prospect of such a mucky job. JJ sends Trix up to the farm with the materials.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a marshland walkway with his Dad’s help. Benny hears that the marsh is ‘like a jungle’ and becomes determined to finds some jungle animals like tigers. Every time he spots one, however, it turns out to be something very ordinary.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are replacing some old pipes outside the town hall. Molly, meanwhile, is practicing for her first aid exam with a reluctant JJ as guinea pig. When Wendy calls JJ’s yard to order a special pipe and Molly offers to deliver it.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang are building a pedestrian crossing. Mrs Percival, meanwhile, has asked Molly to paint a mural of a jungle scene in the school playground.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Wendy and Bob have a very special announcement to make. They are going to fix up an old Houseboat for Wendy to live in. There’s a lot of hard work to be done. They need to make a gang plank, fix solar panels and give it a really good clean.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has a plan to accommodate all of the newcomers. He’s designed a kit house that clips together quickly and easily. Bob’s dad Robert comes to the valley to help build the houses, while Mr and Mrs Bentley conduct a survey on the newcomers’ requirements.

programme.title: The Big Dino Dig
programme.desc: In this new episodic special Bob and the team tackle a big new job – building a dinosaur-themed fun park. With the help of park manager Tony Toberomi and new dumper truck Rubble, the team constructs a roller coaster, slide, train ride and flying ride.

programme.desc: It's Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson's first day together as they kick off their journey in Bridlington and head to an auction showdown in Doncaster.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and Charles Hanson are getting on famously as they drive the second leg of their road trip from Scunthorpe to Grantham.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The competition heats up on day three as the two Charlies journey from King's Lynn to the auction in Beccles.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Something's in here
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted team head to the West Midlands to investigate a former chapel. Unexplained noises, footsteps, shadows, and things being moved have all been reported. But which member of the team will Sara choose to lead this investigation?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Something stood behind me!
programme.desc: The team are joined by investigator Miki York, as they investigate an 18th century hall and grounds. Phantom children have been witnessed among many strange incidents, and a haunted basement awaits. But who will lead this investigation?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: I'm so scared
programme.desc: A large haunted and abandoned hotel without electricity in Wales is the venue in this episode, where phantom figures, unexplained voices, and footsteps have been experienced. Investigator Mark Nicholas joins the team. But who will take charge tonight?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Are you kidding me!?
programme.desc: A ghostly white lady, phantom footsteps, and more have been reported at this quirky haunted guest house. Fellow investigator Adam Morgan joins the team as they witness for themselves some of the reported phenomenon. Who will Sara put in charge tonight?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: That was so weird!
programme.desc: A beautiful old-but-haunted town hall, under the shadow of Pendle Hill, is investigated as the team visit Lancashire. Phil witnesses an unexplained figure, Dale gets an unwelcome surprise, and Sara does a vigil with a royal ‘guest’.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: “Sensing Murder” psychics are challenged to connect with the spirit of 53-year-old, Cynthia Greenwood-Smith, to unravel the lies and discover the grim truth surrounding her disappearance from her Gold Coast home in 2001.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost for Words
programme.desc: Spirited teenager Jayne Furlong dreamed of becoming a child psychologist - instead, she ended up a prostitute. In 1993, 17 year old Jayne vanished from her patch on Auckland's Karangahape Road.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Sue Nicholson and Deb Webber investigate one of the most complex and intriguing cases ever featured - did Waikato man Jason Dark commit suicide or was he murdered, as his family believes?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Fallen Angel
programme.desc: In this episode of Sensing Murder we learn about the murder of Angela Blackmoore, a 21 year old woman with a 2 year old child. The child was not harmed and the killer has not been found.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Man
programme.desc: A grieving mother suspects her deceased son may have fallen victim to a mysterious entity called The Dark Man.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Pet Cemetery
programme.desc: Ryan and his team investigate the bizarre haunting of a woman and her dog in Waterboro, Maine. The Labrador was chewing at her own fur and standing on guard on the bed, growling at unseen figures.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Lost Souls
programme.desc: PRS and Psychic/medium Michelle Belanger investigate a Pennsylvania home; where a mother named Kathy and her son Michael have both felt the presence of a young boy and hear voices calling, "Mom?" but no one is there.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Beer, Wine and Spirits
programme.desc: Brian's bar has a cranky customer who's got a bad habit of breaking wine glasses. Charlie has been dead since prohibition.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Bedroom Eyes
programme.desc: PRS travels to rural Pennsylvania to investigate a haunting that began after a new couple moved into an old family farm.?Over the next three days, hidden tragedies are uncovered and latent psychic abilities are revealed.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Devil in Syracuse
programme.desc: The clients are new, but the spirit is all too familiar as Ryan Buell prepares himself to battle the taunting demon that has been following him.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Homecoming
programme.desc: Ryan brings PRS to his hometown of Sumter, SC to investigate a chilling case where a young boy was tragically shot and killed on a front doorstep while trick-or-treating on Halloween.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: When Paula's young autistic son Michael, with limited verbal skills uttered the words "Go away scary dead boy" -- it sent a chill up her spine.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Mothman
programme.desc: Ryan takes his team to Point Pleasant, West Virginia to investigate his own personal holy grail of paranormal lore: the mysterious Mothman.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Walton Hall
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team visit a gem in the Cheshire countryside where a disembodied voice brings disarray to the investigation and something in the cellar fills Yvette with fear and dread.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Oak House
programme.desc: Yvette takes her team to Oak House, said to be one of the most haunted places in West Bromwich. Fear and fright take hold when something seems to follow them and one experience changes the belief of both Glen and Karl.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Middleton Hall
programme.desc: Yvette and her team are called to a grade II listed building that spans over 900 years in an attempt to uncover the mysterious paranormal activity that is said to occur there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: HMP Shrewsbury Part 1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and her team take on their biggest challenge yet in a prison where many have lost their lives and some seem to have remained.

programme.title: Most Haunted: HMP Shrewsbury Part 2
programme.desc: Part two of this mammoth investigation takes the team to the condemned cell and execution room. Is it a hangman or one of the executed souls that makes itself present and causes the team to re-evaluate what they are doing.

programme.title: A Haunting: Norman the Doll
programme.desc: Paranormal investigator, Stephen Lancaster, doesn’t believe in haunted objects until he captures proof the doll he recently acquired is haunted. Fearing he is in over his head, he attempts to get rid of it, but the doll has other plans.

programme.title: A Haunting: Legend Trippers
programme.desc: High school classmates test out an old ghost story on Halloween night.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Dark Side
programme.desc: The Wilcott’s 5-year-old son is attacked by an unseen entity. Their only hope is an exorcism.

programme.title: A Haunting: Child’s Play
programme.desc: The loving spirit of Chris' late grandmother is watching over his close-knit family. But she is trying to warn them: a fierce and relentless demon has crept into their home. Chris reaches out to a paranormal team and a demonologist to battle the demon.

programme.title: A Haunting: Grave Awakenings
programme.desc: When ghosts confront Zoe Dei, she makes the harrowing discovery that her home harbors a paranormal portal which has awakened her dormant ability as psychic medium, forcing her to learn how to live with her newfound ability to see the dead.

programme.title: A Haunting: Immortal Love
programme.desc: Shortly after Whitney's family moving into their first home, a restless spirit shatters the serenity of their suburban life. Whitney calls in a paranormal team who uncover the truth behind the spirit's tragic death and his intense obsession with Whitney.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear

programme.title: Masha and the Bear
programme.desc: On a nice summer's day Bear, as usual, goes fishing and Masha follows alongside. But the fishing trip didn't quite work out: the forest dwellers made a beach at Bear's favourite spot. Masha is glad to have the opportunity to swim.

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.desc: Eric and Rabbi Glass cancel Matt and Sarah's wedding in protest of their union.

programme.title: Gunsmoke

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Ruthless outlaws try to make Marshal Dillon leave Dodge City by threatening to kill a man a day until he departs.

programme.desc: Monica, Tess and Andrew help a young man lost in a life or death struggle with what seems to be a case of split personality, but turns out to be something far more sinister.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: A driven newspaper editor must choose between a shocking front page headline or her own sister's reputation.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: After a man, who has been living in his father's shadow, inherits the family taffy factory to which he has never felt attached, he must choose whether or not to sell it.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels must help a troubled young boy who wants to divorce his parents.

programme.desc: Paula Zahn examines how police raced to track down a vicious killer on his deadly cross-country journey.

programme.desc: Nearly four decades after the brutal murder of Elaine Fogle, a detective is asked to investigate the unsolved case once again. He enlists the help of a retired investigator who had stored away an important clue in a rusty filing cabinet decades ago.

programme.title: Sliders

programme.title: Sliders
programme.desc: The Sliders enter a world on which they must remain for 27 hours, but find themselves running for cover in a bomb-targeted alley.

programme.title: Sliders

programme.desc: In November 1993, Derek and Eileen Severs disappeared without a word. When police spoke to their son, Roger, he insisted they were on holiday. However, there was no evidence of this apparent trip, and Roger was soon arrested on suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: DNA Of A Murder: Andrew George

programme.title: Killer Britain: Vincent Tabak
programme.desc: When landscape architect Joanna Yeates disappeared after work Christmas drinks, the nation was gripped by the search for her. Tragedy struck on Christmas day morning when her body was found in a snow-covered lane. But who had killed the young woman

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly throws a birthday party for Stuart and Nicki, but her real motive is to impress a guy she's just met who's new in town. Nicki and Stuart's dad shows up and ruins everything.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Lemon Squeeze Episode

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Tit for Tat Episode

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Quarantine Episode
programme.desc: When Marilyn brings a dangerous flu back from a trip to Mexico, the family must stay inside their house under quarantine.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The V.I.P. Tickets Episode

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Lindsey Dances Episode

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Career Day Episode

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The House Sitter's Episode
programme.desc: Nick and Suzanne's next door's neighbors become irresponsible house sitters.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Big Loan Episode

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Last Tango (Saada case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Very Strange Suicide (Muller case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Little Martyrship of A10: The Inass Touloub Affair

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Everlasting

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Open Windows
programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case their way, 15 Division will have decide whether to take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Perfect Family

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Uprising

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats
programme.desc: Grime artist and self-taught chef Big Zuu travels to Croydon with his food truck and sidekicks Hyder and Tubsey to cook a meal that will impress Jimmy Carr just after he steps off stage.

programme.title: Big Zuu's Big Eats

programme.title: Knight Rider

programme.desc: Shawn and Gus are on their ski vacation when Shawn spots wanted international art thief Pierre Despereaux (Cary Elwes). Despereaux is so good, he’s never left enough evidence behind to be formally accused and so promptly gives Shawn and Gus the slip.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: When a billionaire crashes his small plane in the woods, Shawn and Gus join the search to find the wreckage, but they arrive only in time to hear his last words - he was murdered.

programme.title: Psych

programme.title: Psych

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: One Taelon Avenue
programme.desc: Joshua Doors is running his own technology development company and Renee goes undercover to find out what is going on. An artificial intelligence program of the Taelons that controls human minds seems to be acting on its own.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Abduction

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 95

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 85

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 123

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder
programme.desc: To the outside world, their marriages seemed happy. But behind closed doors, there was no domestic bliss. These women wanted out, but getting a divorce wasn’t their preferred option.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: In some cases, the transformation from everyday woman to brutal killer is activated by a man. A boyfriend or husband can become the focus of a deadly obsession.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Judi Buenoano secretly murdered lovers to claim on insurance policies whilst nurse Genene Jones secretly killed at least 46 infants left in her care between 1980 and 1982.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Millionaire Murder
programme.desc: A businessman went to Florida to make one last deal before he retired-he never returned home to his millions. Authorities examined who was closest to him and who stood to gain from his disappearance. But this time conventional rules didn't apply.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: He was a predator, abducting girls and young women from their own front yards in broad daylight. He was a sadist: phoning one victim's family, taunting them, boosting then dashing their hope, and he wouldn't stop until we stopped him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Trail
programme.desc: The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: 16-Year-Old Surrogate Stole Our Baby
programme.desc: Sarah was Dawn and Derek's surrogate, but took off while five months pregnant. Sarah claims that they took advantage of her. Who are the baby's rightful parents?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant
programme.desc: Megan is 14 and pregnant with 19 year old Michael’s baby, but he doesn’t see any problems with this situation. Laurie, Megan’s mother, turns to Steve to help get through to her!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Violated Me!
programme.desc: Monique wants to prove that Chris attacked her when he gave her a ride home after a party. But Chris denies any wrongdoing, and says Monique was too drunk to know what happened.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Teen Daughter Wants a Baby

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Starving Myself to Death

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Woman In Green

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes investigates a missing boy that vanishes on a train after he and his father have a fight.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Dr. Watson and the inspector are led to a little shop when Holmes goes missing.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes helps to track down a killer who leaves clues next to the women he kills.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A school boy vandalizes church steps with faculty names, that are then later found dead.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An advice columnist turns to Holmes when a man badly beats him and threatens a young woman's life.

programme.title: The Pearl of Death
programme.desc: When a valuable pearl with a sinister reputation is stolen, Sherlock Holmes must investigate its link to a series of brutal murders.

programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutalchoosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.desc: The teams must herd farm animals into their proper pens and decide which proteins and starches they will use next.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay puts two teams of aspiring chefs through a series of tough challenges. The teams meet new members before heading into a team challenge in which they must prepare a tasting menu for a dog show.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams roll the dice to determine the ingredients for their next team challenge, while a contestant leaves due to an injury. The cooks cater for music legends during dinner service, including Stewart Copeland and Steven Tyler.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Ron Wyatt, a Nashville nurse turned amateur archaeologist at 47, aimed to validate Bible stories. In 1977, he claimed finding Noah’s Ark on Mount Ararat and later dived for Egyptian chariot remains, supporting Moses’ Red Sea crossing.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1924, a girl found a quartz crystal skull in Central America, believing it had telepathic powers. Legend says thirteen such skulls will unlock life’s mysteries. Modern science has debunked their authenticity, despite some being in museums.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Historian Michael Hesemann sought to authenticate the Titulus Crucis, believed to be a piece of Christ's cross. Displayed in a Rome church, it spans from Jerusalem to modern Rome, backed by records since the 1400s.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Famed archaeologist Ralegh Radford stares into an empty pit; has he found the final resting place of King Arthur, the wielder of Excalibur, the founder of Camelot and the Lord of the Round Table?

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Had a mysterious German prospector, known as the Dutchman, found the richest gold mine in America? When he died keeping the mine’s location secret, Dick Holmes - a young cowhand - went on a quest to track it down.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Metropolitan Museum, New York
programme.desc: From the mystery of a king’s madness to a silver chalice some think is the Holy Grail, discover the secrets inside the Metropolitan Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens
programme.desc: From a dodgy archeologist who discovers a golden mask to an ancient gadget that reveals the future, discover the secrets inside the National Archaeological Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Hermitage Museum
programme.desc: From ancient mummies who sport tattoos to re-examining who really killed Rasputin, discover the secrets inside the State Hermitage Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Java: Land of Fire
programme.desc: In the Pacific Ring of Fire island of Java, George explores new ash eruptions from Anak Krakatau, whose 1883 eruption shook the world. He travels to Merapi and descends into Kawah Ijen to explore the world's largest lake of sulfuric acid.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Eco-Disasters
programme.desc: Uzbekistan's Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, shrunk to 1/6 its previous size; a Crimea mountain carved into a submarine base; Chernobyl nuclear site reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane
programme.desc: Linking up with legendary storm chaser Jim Leonard, George flies to Jamaica to track Hurricane Dean. George then travels to Nova Scotia to experience the even bigger turmoil of Hurricane Noel at the iconic Maritime village of Peggy's Cove.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Fin Del Mundo
programme.desc: Although he admits to not being much of a sailor, George climbs aboard a sailing vessel to explore the extreme southern tip of South America (Fin Del Mundo aka the "End of the World").

programme.title: Angry Planet: African Hellhole
programme.desc: George explores the deadly Nyiragongo volcano in the Congo jungle but the lava lake dwelling inside it's crater may be the least of his worries as he has to negotiate through armed conflict, a family of gorillas, and severe weather.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Thunder Down Under
programme.desc: In Australia George teams up with storm chaser Jimmy Deguara to witness summer storms in the outback. While in Oz, he dives the magnificent Great Barrier Reef, and explores just how painful is the sting of the venomous Box Jellyfish.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Weather Season
programme.desc: 2005 seemed to be the year that Earth went wild. Follow George as he brings us back to the site of his hairiest adventures from that year.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Most people's idea of a dream wedding might include a horse drawn carriage and an elaborate ceremony. Not George. Join him as he and his bride to be tie the knot in an unusual and certainly exotic way.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Polynesian Volcanoes
programme.desc: In New Zealand, George learns that an undersea volcano 1000 miles North in Tonga is creating a new island. After nautical mishaps, clad in nothing but underwear and a life jacket, George becomes one of the first explorers on this new land.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: From "Fin Del Mundo," George sails on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps in Antarctic snow and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off melting glaciers.

programme.title: Angry Planet: West Coast Winter Weather
programme.desc: On Canada's rugged West Coast, George ice-climbs a frozen waterfall, uses ski-skins to climb Mt.Garibaldi to an alpine lake, visits a storm-watching lodge on British Columbia's Long Beach, home of winter surfing and massive Pacific storms.

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Ever Expanding Universe
programme.desc: The Ever-Expanding Universe investigates a battery of high-tech telescopes that are joining the Hubble Space Telescope on its quest to unlock the secrets of our universe, a cosmos almost incomprehensible in its size, age and violence.

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Mystery of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Mystery of the Milky Way chronicles the history of telescopes, from Galileo's refractor to Newton's reflector and beyond. This episode also looks at recent missions, including the Herschel Space Observatory's examination of the Milky Wa

programme.title: In the Shadow of the Moon
programme.desc: Between 1968 and 1972, the world watched in awe each time an American spacecraft voyaged to the Moon. Only 12 men walked upon its surface and they remain the only human beings to have stood on another world.

programme.title: Karelia - Russia's Primeval Forests
programme.desc: Journey into a unique wilderness in Russia’s north: Karelia.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Silk Road

programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow Dog turns to the fugitive's on-again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.desc: Today, Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.desc: Dog is confronted with two alleged felons in crisis. Family and friends of these bondees are convinced that they are getting into further trouble while awaiting trial, so Dog and the posse have to bring these men back to jail.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Aloha, Robertsons!
programme.desc: After all their hard work, Willie decides to take the entire Robertson clan on a family vacation to Hawaii. But Willie's daily itinerary for the trip gets constantly undermined by the family's desire to participate in their own island activities.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Till Duck Do Us Part
programme.desc: Everyone comes together to plan a surprise wedding for Phil and Kay, setting up a special ceremony on their land, which the whole family attends. Si distracts Phil and Kay by taking them on a "trip down memory lane".
